A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College has a rating of 4.02 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.96 on Campus Life, 4.22 on Placements, 4.08 on Faculty and 3.49 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College is around INR 50000 - INR 200000.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College are Construction Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 381 students were admitted at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College and 399 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 399 students 311 were placed with median salary of INR 365000 and 14 students opted for higher studies. A total of 358 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering Collegeand 366 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 366 students 306 were placed with median salary of INR 400000 and 7 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 13 students were admitted at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College and 13 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 13 students 4 were placed with median salary of INR 240000. A total of 7 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering Collegeand 7 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 7 students 2 were placed with median salary of INR 240000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Join a club and enrich your knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Technical support and technical associate placement percentage at our college was around 89% (genuine record). The highest salary package was 10 Lacs, while the lowest CTC was 3.4 Lacs, with an average CTC of 4.5 Lacs. Top recruiters for our course included Capgemini, Cognizant, Presidio, Accenture, and Infosys. Fifty percent of the students secured internships from startup companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are a total of 9 labs for our department, along with a library and a tutorial room. The hostel quality is okay, and the food is also acceptable—not fantastic, but not too bad. There is a medical room at our college that provides free first aid, and it also has a B.Ed program within it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Our college has a good placement record for all departments for both IT and core companies. Top MNCs like Zoho, Cognizant, TCS, Presidio, etc., are the top recruiters of our college. The highest package of the current academic year is 18 LPA. The average salary package is 4.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college maintains a good, clean, and greenery campus of 15 acres, with modern classrooms, well-maintained laboratories, and a Wi-Fi-enabled campus that supports hands-on and practical learning. The library is well-stocked with academic resources, journals, and digital access to learning platforms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: MSEC College: all you need to know before joining the college.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 90% of students are placed in this year and the highest package is 11 LPA. Top companies like Accenture, Cognizant, and TCS are recruiting at this college and 50% of the students got internships. The top roles offered are frontend development, full-stack development, and backend development.
review_content.Infrastructure: For my course B.Tech IT, labs are provided for specific courses and dedicated labs for every year, like for 1st year specific labs that have Ethernet connections. Hostels have rooms but they are below average. The fee is 40,000 rupees and 3 members per room are allotted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: University and it's universal truth.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 60% of students are placed in our class. The average package is 40k per year and the top companies that came to recruit us are Accenture, presidio, Infosys, Kaar Technology, Embedded Your, Ncompass ust global, Visai, SIT, etc. The highest package offer is about 9 LPA and the lowest is about 2.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lab systems are not well maintained and cleaned. The network is weak sometimes and the entire college has a single library. Hostel food is average and canteen food is not much good. Fewer sports activities. There is no understanding from teachers to students who are struggling to study.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives an enjoyable college life.

review_content.Placements: Around 97% of students get placed in our college. Placement officers encourage students to perform well in their job interviews and help them throughout the process. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. The recruiting companies are CTS and Infosys. Around 45% of students get internships. The role offered is a software engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are available with all the facilities. It has a big library. The quality of the food served in the hostel is not good. The canteen is a good place to have fun with friends.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a better place for studying, not for enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of students have been placed. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA to 11 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters are Zoho, Google, Tidel, etc. Around 60% of students got internships. The college recommends many companies. I am in my first year, so I don't have much knowledge about placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our hostel is not good. Sometimes, the food is better. There are no medical facilities in our hostel. It is a negative point for our college. The hostel is fine for the fee.

Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 35162 to 112182. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College was B.E. in Computer Science Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 35162.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. reviews.review_text: Our hostel is not good. Sometimes, the food is better. There are no medical facilities in our hostel. It is a negative point for our college. The hostel is fine for the fee.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good environment, very good placements, and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was well-equipped with industry-standard labs and classrooms. All the classrooms had properly maintained rooms and desks. Every department had an innovation room with digital capabilities. The food served in our college was above average. Hostels can accommodate more than 2,000 students. There was an annual sports competition that included volleyball, cricket, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: A good campus with better infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Best infrastructure with libraries, computer systems and with proper network. Classrooms are well maintained. Hostel is food quite poor in mess and canteen is so good. Sports and games are conducted regularly. Course teaching is so easier to understand and lab activities are easier.

reviews.review_heading: In pandemic situation also, they placed many students in good valuable companies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of classroom and labs are very excellent, but it has no Wi-Fi facilities for students. Hostel and hostel food were below average. Hostel Life is very wonderful, and they hostel Life teaches many lessons to my personal life. Hostel food was valuable for the money.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The library of our college has all standard books in mechanical engineering by Indian and foreign authors, which are good for learning. Classrooms are good and clean. The food served in the canteen is good and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent place to excel.
reviews.review_text: There are a vast number of books present in the library. No Wi-Fi facilities are given to the students, and mobile phones and laptops are strictly restricted. The quality of the hostel is what gives a little lower grade to the college, but it is worth it for the fees collected.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good lab facilities and great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a huge library, more than 200 computers, and Wi-Fi in the lab. The food served in the canteen is of good quality. The hostel is surrounded by greenery, and there is a doctor inside the campus for emergency purposes. The gym facilities are available for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has various facilities like good Wi-Fi, good quality of canteen and hostel food. Classrooms are well-maintained. Sports facilities are good. The campus is neat and clean, with many trees and a green environment. Hostel rooms and buildings are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Meenakshi Sundararajan Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very clean, eco-friendly infrastructure with plants and trees everywhere for maintaining the oxygen level. Students keep their classes clean and do not litter the ground anywhere. Canteen food is good but hostel food is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college and course.
reviews.review_text: Our college is clean and eco-friendly. There are plants and trees everywhere. Students do not throw trash anywhere. The classroom is clean, and students keep their classes clean. The food in the canteen is good. Hostel food is acceptable.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Palamu Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the hostel management and college faculty.

content.Placements: The placement rate is very low because it is a new college located in a rural area. Some students from the Mechanical department get placed in private companies with a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month, but there is no information about other branches. I hope by the 3rd year, we get placement opportunities from better companies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel food is average, and cleanliness is very poor, happening only 2–3 times a month. Washroom gates are broken, and the hostel warden is careless.
content.Faculty: Faculty is not very cooperative. They ask students to complete the syllabus on their own and do not focus on student performance. Students have different capabilities, but they are not supported. For example, a friend of mine presented a startup idea that teachers liked, and his team was selected for the next level and won Rs. 50,000 to start their project, but the principal kept the money. There is a shortage of teachers, and the teaching faculty is not committed to their work. They often skip parts of the syllabus, sometimes covering 80 pages of PDF in a 30-minute class.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All the facilities are good here.

content.Placements: So basically, our college is newly established. The 2022-26 Batch is the first one that is appearing for placement, and in Electrical Engineering, it is quite good. 60-70% have been placed, and the rest of the students will also be placed in the upcoming days. Top recruitment companies like Jindal Saw Limited, Usha Martin, NBC Bearing, Electroplasts Limited, Bharat Gears, etc., recruit.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good in my college, as it was newly built in 2022, and is modern. Wi-fi is all over the academic building. Labs are set up like electrical engineering labs are established. The library is well-maintained, with all kinds of books present. Hostels are new and well-maintained, with modern facilities.

individual_reviews.title: You get back 80-90% fee back, very good college. I am a little bit dissatisfied with some campuses.

content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing and attractive. But boys hostels are limited. There are 2 boys hostels and 1 girls hostel. They have their own gym area but equipments are not available right now. Mess food is decent not hifi like restaurants because it is government. College is not a private institution that charges lakhs. B.Tech fees are very low Rs 55,000 tuition fee needed to complete your B.Tech thus return on investment is maximum.

The hostel rooms are fully furnished. Students enjoy playing sports like cricket, volleyball, and football. In January, a cricket tournament is held among the four branches.

reviews.review_heading: Detailed review of GEC palamu .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good because it is recently made, and all the classrooms are also very good. Teachers take classes in seminar halls, which are fully air-conditioned. The library is very small and has a very limited number of books and articles.

reviews.review_heading: Complete information about Government Engineering College, Palamu.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good as the college is new. The classrooms are all well-equipped with classes being taken in seminar halls which are fully air conditioned. There are 2 hostels for boys and 1 hostel for girls. The hostel is good with 24/7 electricity and water supply. The mess food quality is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Palamu.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The hostel fee is 9500 per year. There are separate hostels for girls and boys. The room is available with 3 beds, tables, 3 chairs, and 3 cupboards for 3 students. Water and electricity are available 24 hours a day. The Mess fee is 3900 per month. The quality of the meal is not too good as compared to the charge students pay.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure overall. However, some classrooms that are not in use tend to be dirty, but the overall structure is very good and new. Hostels are well-maintained, neat, and clean. Regarding hostel food, students need to make some compromises as it is not the same as home-cooked meals.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Palamu.
reviews.review_text: The campus is comparatively smaller than other colleges. Hostels are currently full, but they may be available next year. The hostels for girls are available. The campus is pretty clean, and there are lots of clubs to participate in. They also organize an annual sports meet within the college.

reviews.review_heading: A detailed review of GEC, Palamu.
reviews.review_text: The campus is new and well-maintained, with fresh infrastructure and air-conditioned seminar halls. The environment is green, and clean. The campus is frequently described as green, clean, and wellness-oriented. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, with two boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. Hostel fees are approximately Rs. 9,500 per year, and monthly mess charges are around Rs. 3,900.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very good. Features, as compared to government colleges, it is very good. The hostel charge is yearly 9,500, and the mess charge is monthly 3,900. There is a menu provided by the mess according to which it runs. The food is good, not bad. There is one study table, one personal almirah, and one bed provided to each student, and there are a total of 3 students from the same branch in each room.

reviews.review_heading: GEC palamu : Should you opt!
reviews.review_text: Speaking about the faculty members, all are quite good, all have done there phds from well reputed institute in india like IITs and NITs. Also I want to add one more point to this is that most of the faculty members here are transferred from BIT SINDRI. Talking about the infrastructure as the college is new all the stuff are well maintained, hostels are spacious,  3 students live in one room, the mess food is like average not so good, sports like cricket, volleyball, football also happens here.

reviews.review_heading: No Placement states. Government. College. Infra Good. EE lab good no hostel for 2025 batch.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi in Only College Building. No Wi-Fi in hostel. Library is available but in limited time slots, close in 4:30 pm in working days only? Classroom are good equipped with AC. Mess is always mess. Sports facility are below avg. No Big Ground for cricket. Plus point is we got 24?7 Electricity and water supply in hostel. But wait there is no any seat left in hostel for 2025 student. They have to stay in PG. For which they have to struggle as maximum room in locality are occupied. IIT level lab for...

reviews.review_heading: Know more about GEC Palamu.
reviews.review_text: At Government Engineering College Palamu, we have a large campus with well-equipped classrooms and a library. However, Wi-Fi is not yet available for students. The mess provides food that is good enough to eat. Medical facilities are provided, and we are allowed to play games.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology:

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and B.Com. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology programmes is around INR 60,000 to 3,34,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Department of technology, CCSU.

review_content.Placements: There is a great active placement cell in my college which helps many students to get their dream job and to be successful in life. Approximately 90% of students got their placement in the placement cell and top companies comes to our college. Various types of job opportunities are there.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and attractive, all the buildings are well-maintained and very attractive. There is Wi-Fi available on the overall campus, and there is a very vast playground. There are various canteens in which food quality is very good and satisfactory.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in our college. The college provides complete guidance and assistance to the students. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA, maximum is 5 LPA. Top companies like Wipro and Google approached the employee as an intern. Top recruiters are Wipro, Google, and Adobe. Around 50% of students got internships. Top roles offered are accounting, sales, finance, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good furniture and clean classrooms. We have helpful staff with AV rooms where they can visually explain the subjects and chapters which makes it easy to understand. They provide the projectors in each class. Proper facilities for sports like badminton, cricket and so on.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc (Honours) in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Both infrastructure and faculty members are very good. Placements are available here.

review_content.Placements: In my college, some companies like Unacademy and Infosys visit the college for placements. Some students in my course also do internships. In my college, the highest package is 6 LPA and the minimum package is 3 LPA. Students passing from my university are also working in some big companies and some students are working in Microsoft and some in Google.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I talk about facilities, then the facility of Wi-Fi in my department is very good. The computer lab is available. Classrooms are also very good. The hostel food is not a little better to eat.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, MCA, B.Sc (Hons.), MBA/PGDM, B.Sc, BBA, B.Com, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering, IT & Software, Science, Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology boasts an impressive review rating of 3.89 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.24 for Campus Life, 3.14 for Placements, 3.86 for Faculty, and 4.13 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is the worst college, but one thing is good, that there is no pressure for attendance.

content.Placements: There are no placements. Even small companies do not come. Even TCS company does not visit here. There is no competition in the tech-related field. Even the hackathon team is not selected from my college, besides students participating. It does not conduct any tour, and we will not get the college life that we hope for.
content.Infrastructure: There is a small room and three people have to live there. The mess food is worse than stall food. There is no canteen. Hostel timing for girls in the evening is only 6:00 PM. Staff and matrons are very rude and go against our character. Bathrooms are also very dirty.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and supportive faculty members with good campus life.

content.Placements: Placements in the computer science branch are decent but can vary from batch to batch. Around 40–50 percent of students in my batch got placed through campus drives, while others secured opportunities off-campus. The highest package offered is about 6 LPA. The lowest is around 2 LPA, and the average is near 3 LPA – 3.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, and some startups visited the campus. Around 20–25 percent of students also received internships in roles like software development, testing, and support. Placements are satisfactory, but consistent preparation beyond campus drives improves the chances.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Department of technology, CCSU.

content.Placements: There is a great active placement cell in my college which helps many students to get their dream job and to be successful in life. Approximately 90% of students got their placement in the placement cell and top companies comes to our college. Various types of job opportunities are there.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is very good and attractive, all the buildings are well-maintained and very attractive. There is Wi-Fi available on the overall campus, and there is a very vast playground. There are various canteens in which food quality is very good and satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 90% of students got placed in our college. The college provides complete guidance and assistance to the students. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA, maximum is 5 LPA. Top companies like Wipro and Google approached the employee as an intern. Top recruiters are Wipro, Google, and Adobe. Around 50% of students got internships. Top roles offered are accounting, sales, finance, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good furniture and clean classrooms. We have helpful staff with AV rooms where they can visually explain the subjects and chapters which makes it easy to understand. They provide the projectors in each class. Proper facilities for sports like badminton, cricket and so on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc (Honours) in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Both infrastructure and faculty members are very good. Placements are available here.

content.Placements: In my college, some companies like Unacademy and Infosys visit the college for placements. Some students in my course also do internships. In my college, the highest package is 6 LPA and the minimum package is 3 LPA. Students passing from my university are also working in some big companies and some students are working in Microsoft and some in Google.
content.Infrastructure: If I talk about facilities, then the facility of Wi-Fi in my department is very good. The computer lab is available. Classrooms are also very good. The hostel food is not a little better to eat.

admission_process.title: Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc(Hons.), B.Sc., MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 60,000 - 3,34,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

The Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 358537 and 1244485 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Information Technology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 358537 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 437790 in 2023 and 459868 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Information Technology demonstrated a declining trend.

Sir Chotu Ram Institute of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. library.description:
The Library is housed in its magnificent three-storied building, ideally located in the centre of the campus. The Library is manned by the sufficient and competent, well qualified team which is well trained to operate. Library functions through the latest computer software programme and one entire floor is devoted to provide the reading room facility to over 200 students at a time.

Library has a stock of over 45,000 books and other materials by way of prominent technical periodicals, dailies and e-journals with a good facility of internet labs.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college, but one thing is good, that there is no pressure for attendance.
reviews.review_text: There is a small room and three people have to live there. The mess food is worse than stall food. There is no canteen. Hostel timing for girls in the evening is only 6:00 PM. Staff and matrons are very rude and go against our character. Bathrooms are also very dirty.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and supportive faculty members with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. It has spacious classrooms and computer labs. It provides access to Wi-Fi in most areas. The library has technical books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are average, but manageable. Along with decent rooms and basic facilities. The food in the mess is hygienic, but the menu can get repetitive. Sports facilities like cricket, football, and indoor games are available for students. Medical facilities are present but could be improve with faster se...

reviews.review_heading: Department of technology, CCSU.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good and attractive, all the buildings are well-maintained and very attractive. There is Wi-Fi available on the overall campus, and there is a very vast playground. There are various canteens in which food quality is very good and satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college has good furniture and clean classrooms. We have helpful staff with AV rooms where they can visually explain the subjects and chapters which makes it easy to understand. They provide the projectors in each class. Proper facilities for sports like badminton, cricket and so on.

reviews.review_heading: Both infrastructure and faculty members are very good. Placements are available here.
reviews.review_text: If I talk about facilities, then the facility of Wi-Fi in my department is very good. The computer lab is available. Classrooms are also very good. The hostel food is not a little better to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Engineering of the CCSU students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life was good. It provided a very good mess which has very healthy food for students, offering a variety of dishes on different days of the week. It also had a library, sports complex, and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is one of the best features of my university. You get free Wi-Fi 24/7, advanced classrooms, and there are two libraries, one for B.Tech students and one for all courses. Almost every student gets hostel facilities if they want. The hostel facility is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with college because of the timely improvement in teachers and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel building was quite poor in quality. But it was NAAC A+ rating. Wi-Fi was available in every corner of the infrastructure. Library was quite pretty. The quality of the food, medical facilities, and sports was pretty good. The college campus life was very good. We will have to visit to see the beautiful environment of the college. I assure that students would not regret it after they visit the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you have to study for government exams, then take a chance; otherwise, no.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent. The buildings of the college are good, and the teachers are also good. They don't pressurize you for anything. The hostel is one of the good aspects of this college because it is very cheap and good for the students.

reviews.review_heading: My college SCRIET review.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are very better, and all are Ph.D. holders. The campus has 24-hour Wi-Fi. The labs are average, and the classroom capacity for students in the EC branch and one library for B.Tech students. In the hostel, there are double-sharing rooms. The charges for the mess and room are 38,000 per year: 4,000 for hostel fees and 27,000 for mess fees. There is one canteen, and medical support facilities are also available, along with several sports grounds and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good Hostel life, Below average placements, good for making memories, affordable government college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel room is a double-sharing room with 2 beds, 2 almirahs, 2 tables and chairs, 2 tubelights with one extra holder, and 2 hangers for each student. The mess food is not excellent but one can eat. Sometimes they cook the worst food in the world but sometimes the quality is good. In the morning you will get dishes like poha, daliya, macaroni, sandwiches, paratha, etc. In the afternoon and night, you will get roti, rice, rajma/kadhi/chole/dal, and a dry vegetable for sure. On Sunday in the a...

reviews.review_heading: I am Absolutely Dissatisfied Because of Bad Faculty, Placement, but Really Good Infrastructure
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. As it was founded by the government, there is a Wi-Fi setup for the entire campus. There are labs, surveil suited with the required equipment, and classrooms are also being up. There is also a library for students to study in. The hostel is okay for the amount of money that was paid, but the mess is very bad, and the food quality is much worse than what was expected.

reviews.review_heading: My college review: CCS University Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are well good; all are Ph.D. holders and very supportive, but a few teachers do not show interest in teaching. The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled, and the labs are in moderate condition. The classroom capacity is 60 students, one central library, and one library separate for B.Teach students. The hostel is government-run, and the yearly fee is about 38,000, including the mess fee. Medical support is also provided. The sports complex is very huge and has different indoor and outdoor gam...

reviews.review_heading: Helping someone to take admission in the right place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good on the campus. There is good food in the canteen, and there is a big library for every student with the computer lab. The environment in the library is very peaceful and good for study, and there is a big ground and gym on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and feels.
reviews.review_text: In the context of Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, infrastructure is great. It provides all the facilities that you need. Hostel is bit old, so you can expect smaller rooms, but that is the case with most of the government hostels in any government college. Quality of food in the mess is apt according to the feels. You can expect 5 Mbps speed of Wi-Fi in your hostel rooms.

admission_process.title: Imperial College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Imperial College of Engineering and Research (ICOER) admissions are completelyentrance-based. Candidates are offered admission toBTech, MTech and MBAprogrammes under the affiliation ofSPPU. Imperial College of Engineering admissions are granted based on scores of various national-level entrance exams such asJEE Main, GATE, MAT, CAT, etc., for respective candidates. However, Maharashtra domicile candidates can also get admission to BTech and MBA programmes via a valid score of state-levelMHT CET and MAH MBA CET, respectively. The final seat allotment for all the courses at theImperial College of Engineering and Researchis done throughDTE Counsellingprocess. Read on the following article to know more about ICOER admissions 2025:

Admissions at Imperial College of Engineering is entrance-based for allUG & PG coursesin the stream of Management andEngineering. Candidates need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria as per the course requirement. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for Imperial College of Engineering course admission 2025:

Imperial College of Engineering feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Check below the total tuition fee for Imperial College of Engineering courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Imperial College of Engineering seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the intake for top Imperial College of Engineering courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Imperial College of Engineering admissions are completely entrance-based. Candidates must go through a multi-level process to secure a seat at ICOER. Find below the detailed steps for the Imperial College of Engineering admission process:
Step 1: ICOER Application Process
Candidates willing to be admitted to any of the UG or PG courses must apply on the official website of the institute for their desired programme. The application form is filled in an online mode.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

As per the selection process of the Imperial College of Engineering and Research, candidates are shortlisted based on their merit of the last qualifying exam of previous education. Further, candidates are selected based on scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, MHT CET, CAT, etc. Candidates need to qualify for the respective entrance exam in order to secure a seat at the institute.
Step 3: Counselling Process

After the commencement of all the selection rounds, candidates must register for the DTE counselling process. The final seat/ college allotment for all the UG and PG courses at ICOER is done through DTE counselling.
Step 4: Final Admission

Once the DTE Counselling process is completed, the college releases final merit lists of the selected candidates. Those whose names appeared in the merit list must report to the allotted institute with all original documents and prescribed fees within the scheduled dates.
For more information check out the below video:

The college infrastructure is very big, and the college campus is very big and green. The college has a good campus and grounds, and also a college canteen. In a college canteen, hygiene is necessary.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Imperial College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is absolutely good there was a peaceful campus with a good library, classrooms, girls hostel and also Wi-Fi with AC provided by the college. The college sports club is very big stadium, and also food court is very nice; the food is extraordinary.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good. There are 2 boys hostels and a girls hostel, and the hostels are well-maintained. A Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. A big cricket field, a football ground, a basketball court, and all sports are available. There are 3 meals, and the quality of the food is good and tasty. College buses are available for almost all routes in Chennai, so there will be no issues in travel. Faculty members are quite good and have experience of more than 10 years. Most o...

reviews.review_heading: Thinking the Civil Engineering Curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Imperial College of Engineering and Research boasts superior facilities, including high-speed Wi-Fi for seamless connectivity, modern and well-equipped classrooms for effective learning, state-of-the-art computer labs with advanced software, and a comprehensive library with a vast collection of resources. These facilities provide students with an optimal learning environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, and this year it has achieved autonomous institute status.
reviews.review_text: The campus boasts a better environment with large, green, and beautiful surroundings. Only girls' hostels are provided within the college premises, while boys have the option of private hostels or PGs. Numerous food stalls inside the campus cater to lunch needs after the break. Adequate security measures are in place on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best time of Life was spent here.
reviews.review_text: College location is easily accessible, and the infrastructure and campus are cool. Free internet is available everywhere, but there is a mobile network issue on the campus. Classrooms are big and have facilities like fans, tables, and projectors. Hostel rooms and facilities are good, but its food is not good. We have a nearby canteen, but it has only good tea, not food.

reviews.review_heading: An average college for mechanical.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good; I loved the campus greenery and the fresh environment. We can study in the garden during exam times. Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus, including the canteen and library. Hostel rooms are small, but I really enjoyed that time; no ragging happens, making it a very safe place. The mess food quality is good, and they provide fruits along with meals. The playground for sports is in the backyard of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Reality and my experience.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is fresh and green, and buildings have facilities like lifts and physical disability services. Free Wi-Fi is available in college; the hostel is only for girls, not for us but in the area, many rooms and mess facilities are available, and the canteen food is fresh and good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but need to improve some things.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was excellent, with plenty of greenery on campus and comfortable classrooms. Hostel is only for girls; there is no hostel for boys. We have to stay in rented rooms; the canteen food is good; on-campus sports fields are present; if anyone is injured, medical facilities like first aid are present.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is not good; they cannot teach students.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good, and this year renovations are going on just because the college has become the university, as there was no need to do so. The route to reach the college is very poor; no good roads are built, so we need to walk.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Only girls' hostels are available in our college. There are no boys' hostels. Our college canteen food is good. Our college pays more attention to girls' safety. They provide free Wi-Fi and a library. Labs and classroom are good. This college has a large playground.

reviews.review_heading: My engineering college is the best college in Pune .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice and there is greenery in this college. There is only girls hostel in the campus and no boys hostel is there. So there is a requirement of boys hostel in the college campus. There are many private hostels . I stay in a private hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College review on, Jspm's Imperial college of engineering and research, wagholi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very big campus, in which a large cricket ground, a very famous place called civil chowk, are present. The college has various labs for various departments, like civil transportation labs, structural labs, irrigation labs etc. The college has good Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good in our college but provides good education.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was not available for boys so they have to stay in PGs or in flats. There were two girls' hostels on campus. The infrastructure of our college was very good. It had a huge library, neat and clean classrooms, and a good campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The journey of students' life.

content.Placements: Students who got above 90% got placed in the college. Top recruiting MNCs are Infosys, Tidal Park, etc. Out of 100%, around 60% of students got internships. The average salary offered to students is approximately Rs. 40,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: All resources are available on the campus itself which is easy for students to access. The library is available for students with all the related topics, books, magazines, articles, and newspapers. The quality of the hostel and food is good and healthy for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is worth the money paid.

content.Placements: Our college provides good placements for our course. It provides many skills to get placements. Tata, Mahindra, Maruti Suzuki, etc., visit our college. The highest salary package offered by Ashok Leyland is 18 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. We have 2 hostels. Our college provides a separate hostel for first-year students. All hostels have Wi-Fi. All classrooms are good. They have a good atmosphere. Our department classrooms are great. The lab is not good. Our college has a canteen and a technopark. The library has many books.

individual_reviews.title: Value for you fees and cost efficiency is less with plenty of knowledge.

content.Placements: The placement faculty members are well knowledge nearly 85%of student got placed to top MNC and many start up companies are hiring the students. The highest package range from 60k per month and the lowest is 15k. Nearly 70%got internship in TCS, Wipro and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Old traditional infrastructure it is quite famous at the early 20's now compared to other college infrastructure is little poor but vast land of nearly 150acres if more student comes to our college then this is nearly heaven. Then encourage student in sports and extra curricular activities and good environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Instrumentation and Control Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Tamilnadu College of Engineering.

content.Placements: Our batch had online placement drives. All of us got placed in good companies. If you don't have any backlogs, you can get placed on your own in core companies too. Some companies also allow students with backlogs if they have good skills.
content.Infrastructure: Every year, they organise the hostel day function. Those days are really beautiful and golden days in our diary. The hostel menu includes some non-vegetarian items too.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are friendly, and some are strict. If you are a sportsperson, they will help you with that too.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of the college can be maintained well.

content.Placements: Only a few students got placed from college. Most of them got selected through off-campus and in the walking interviews. The highest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 8,000 per month. KPIT and Zoho were the top recruiting companies in our college. The software engineer was the role offered. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 3.3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was Rs. 96,000 per annum. A few students got an internship from college, and the remaining applied by their efforts.

reviews.review_text: Every year, they organise the hostel day function. Those days are really beautiful and golden days in our diary. The hostel menu includes some non-vegetarian items too.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of the college can be maintained well.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs of our college were average, and the library was good. In hostels, a room has to be shared  by four members, which don't have attached bathroom. There were 20 bathrooms, and toilets are available. The hostel was of 3 floors, and the food served was good. Even snacks were served in the evening.

reviews.review_heading: It would be better if the institution conduct fests in a better way.
reviews.review_text: I am studying B.Tech second year in the stream of Information Technology, the quality of teaching in my college is really good and we have an application oriented teaching and learning and my college curriculum is well updated which makes us industry ready.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to do this course, then don't join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is poor. It has Wi-Fi facility, but it provides only 20 MB per day. It cannot access without a VPN. The infrastructure of our college is not well. Classrooms are not equipped with projectors. It has a wooden desk, 5 fans and one green board. The water facility is available for 24 hours. A mess will be available all time. Bus facility is available at very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tamilnadu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi networks available on the campus is worst. Classrooms, sports and games are good. Canteens only provide samosa and biscuits. Labs available in our college are very good, and ventilation is also good. Hostels rooms provided by the college are very good, but there is a land problem in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tamilnadu College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is awesome. The campus is spread over 150 acres and has good greenery. Surroundings are well maintained. Purified RO water is available for 24*7. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Labs have all the facilities. All sportsmen are motivated. The sports room has all the sports equipment. The canteen is clean.

reviews.review_heading: Placements, infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The college has a great infrastructure. The auditorium is fully air-conditioned. It has a capacity to accommodate 1000 students. All the labs are well-equipped with the required instruments. Techno Park provides internet service. Classrooms are upgraded with projectors. The library has more than 50,000 books.

reviews.review_heading: Great place to spend 4 years of your like.
reviews.review_text: All the labs are fully equipped with just the right equipments needed by the university. There is free jio Wi-Fi available throughout campus. The library, computer labs are all up to date with new updates. The canteen provides the food worth your money. The hostel has two buildings of three floors each. There is seperate hostel for girls and boys. In the boys category the first years are housed in seperate block. The college has lot of sports and arts function conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to learn and there is freedom to study.
reviews.review_text: The laboratories are well-equipped and have average smart system facilities. College gives smart class facility for one department. Jio Wi-Fi facility is available. Many games are conducted. The classrooms and hostel have average facilities. The quality of the food is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is a heaven for the students.
reviews.review_text: There is a good infrastructure here. From entrance gate, there is arch attached to the compound wall. In the compound wall, a banner representing the club in our college is present, and in the left corner of the arch, there is a security room behind an ATM Facility. Also, just a few steps away there is a parking area for vehicles.

reviews.review_heading: It is okay for middle class people, when compared to other college fees.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, but it is a little bit old. They are not focused on maintenance because the place is surrounded by 7 lakhs of trees which are planted by Mr Abdul Kalam planting tree organizations. Earlier they did some maintenance, but it was not sufficient.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to enjoy the college life with self-learning
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. They've improved some facilities like canteen and water facility. Other than that average level as many labs have to be improved in infrastructure. The sports facility is good comparatively. None of the college buses is in good condition, and students feel like a roller coaster in some bus. Other than that, infrastructure is average.

individual_reviews.title: Value for money, but you need to do everything by yourself; don't rely on the college.

content.Placements: Placements are not good at all. You need to do hard work to get placements. Although the college is trying hard to bring different kinds of courses and internships you can enroll in, you still need to do lots of hard work to get a job, but you can think about it.
content.Infrastructure: It's an okay type of infrastructure. Don't expect much in terms of infrastructure; even the basic things like washrooms and fans are not working sometimes. The computer systems are not efficient enough to run like they should be, but yeah, it does the job for now.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall experience and journey of college.

content.Placements: The placement process at my college was student-friendly. Many companies like Infosys, Capgemini, and others participated, offering roles in various domains. Pre-placement training, aptitude sessions, and mock interviews were conducted by the placement cell. Overall, it was a good experience that helped provide better career opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The course infrastructure is average. Classrooms have basic facilities like benches, fans, and a projector in some rooms. reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. It has excellent quality Wi-Fi, good connectivity, and free to use. Labs are fully functional and in good condition. Classrooms are clean. It has good light and fan connection. Hostel facility is also good. Library is well organised, and syllabus related books are available.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent college to gain knowledge, great placement, and huge campus with supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: College has very good infrastructure. Campus has a high-speed Wi-Fi facility in every lab and hall. It also has well-equipped computer labs, clean and well-maintained classrooms, and a large library. Hostel food is good, the rooms are clean, and the service is also better. The mess and canteen are clean and good, with tasty food and at very low prices. Medical facilities are also available. College also conducts sports like football, cricket, badminton, kho-kho, and many other outdoor and indoor...

reviews.review_heading: Balanced experience with strong curriculum and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs, and a digital library. Hostels have clean rooms, 24X7 water, decent food in the mess, hygienic canteen, basic medical care, and good sports facilities like gym, courts, and playgrounds.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, nice faculty, nice support from staff.
reviews.review_text: College has very good infrastructure. Campus has a high-speed Wi-Fi facility in every lab and hall. It also has well-equipped computer labs, clean and well-maintained classrooms, and a large library. Hostel food is good, rooms are clean, and service is also better. Mess and canteen are clean and good, with tasty food and at very low prices. Medical facilities are also available. College also conducts sports like football, cricket, badminton, kho-kho, and many other outdoor and indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent to gain knowledge and a great placement, with supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: College has very good infrastructure. Campus has a high-speed Wi-Fi facility in every lab and hall. It also has well-equipped computer labs, clean and well-maintained classrooms, and a large library. Hostel food is good, rooms are clean, and service is also better. Mess and canteen are clean and good, with tasty food and at very low prices. Medical facilities are also available. College also conducts sports like football, cricket, badminton, kho-kho, and many other outdoor and indoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Great college with the best.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, a great vibe of nature, beautiful scenery, and it gives best lab and classrooms. Hostels are clean and safe, and the canteen mess is also good. Sports and games are best time, where you can enjoy very much as we enjoyed a lot.

reviews.review_heading: My review of G. V. Acharya College.
reviews.review_text: College buildings and classrooms are simple and have all basic things you need for classes, like benches and blackboards. Labs have necessary equipment for practical. Computers and machines may not be newest, but they are good enough to complete your syllabus work. There is also a library where you can find books for your subjects.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with decent placements, supportive faculty, and satisfactory infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is well-developed and student-friendly. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors, and library has a good collection of academic resources. Laboratories are well-maintained with updated equipment, and campus offers good internet connectivity. However, some areas, like sports facilities and hostel maintenance, could be improved. Overall, infrastructure supports both academic and extracurricular needs effectively.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MCE - Malnad College of Engineering offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for offline learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech and MCA. MCE - Malnad College of Engineering fee structure ranges between INR 56,940 to 10,45,908.

faqs.answer:
A:    MCE - Malnad College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates passed Diploma are not eligible to take the Entrance Test as there are no lateral entry admissions.MCACandidate must have passed any recognised BCA / Bachelor degree in Computer Science Engineering or equivalent degree and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates) taken together in all the subjects in all the years of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
OR
Candidate must have passed B.Sc. / B.Com / B.A. with Mathematics at 10 + 2 level or at Graduation level (with additional bridge courses as per the norms of the concerned University) and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I of Karnataka candidates) taken together in all the subjects in all the years of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.M.E./M.TechCandidates must have passed qualifying examination or equivalent examination as prescribed by the Competent Authority and obtained an aggregate minimum of 50% marks (45% of marks in case of SC, ST and Category-I candidates) taken together in all the subjects of all the years/ semesters of the Degree Examination from any recognised institute/university.
Final year students can also apply on provisio

faqs.answer: Malnad College of Engineering, more commonly known as MCE, has become a name to reckon with in the country as well as in Karnataka. Established in 1960, it has built an extremely robust brand of quality engineering education and academic excellence over all these decades. MCE currently offers several undergraduate and postgraduate programs in numerous disciplines in the field of engineering and is a common destination for students from almost all parts of the country. The college is renowned for its highly qualified faculty, well-equipped infrastructure, and satisfactory placement avenues. Many students get positions in elite companies after their completion of the engineering degree. Besides, MCE is an institution affiliated with VTU, bringing more quality and acknowledgement to an engineering education system.

reviews.review_text: As you know, Civil is the hardware course. Here, you get to know about how buildings are built, how the loads are distributed among the buildings, the concentration of materials used in a building, etc. Overall, the course I have chosen is the interesting course that I personally love.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placement with scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean rooms, 24/7 water, and electricity supply. Wi-Fi connectivity and adequate security, the misfit quality coverage is good, both offering vegetarian and non-vegetarian options while the canteen provides snacks and refreshment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCE - Malnad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi connections for students. Wi-Fi is high-speed and available 24/7. The library is inside the college campus and has a lot of books, which are divided by branch. Watchmen do not allow entry to the college without showing an ID card. The college has three main gates.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCE - Malnad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The library is decent, but full of old books. Wi-Fi is available, and you have to register to get student Wi-Fi. Classrooms are decent with projectors. Mess is not large, so it gets overcrowded at break time. The sports and games facilities are average. The ground is not good and not well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with my college and the facilities provided. Good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: My department has a library. You need to pay just Rs. 350 and they provide books until you graduate, also there is a computer centre where you can sit and do your tasks. Wi-Fi is available, and there are 4 different labs allotted to individuals as per their requirements. All facilities are available, including bus and food, which can be rated 9/10. There is a gym area in our college, a shuttle badminton court, table tennis court, and large area for playing outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: We are satisfied with our faculty members and there is good placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was not available. Classrooms were also average in our department. Classrooms were very old and not that clean. But library was vast and good. Hostel infrastructure was fine. The quality of food was also good. Medical facilities were not that good but we had sports activities and games were played regularly.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and not that bad. Students can join this college.
reviews.review_text: It has good buildings and infrastructure. Labs and classroom building infrastructure should be improved, but they are good enough. The campus is large with well-developed buildings and an environment.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of MCE - Malnad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms are okay. It has a Wi-Fi for students. The library is one of their best features. It is spacious and has many books. We can borrow books even without library cards. The canteen is quite satisfactory. The food is hygienic and tastes good. It has a girl's waiting hall, where girls can stay and spend their free time. It has gyms and a sports room for indoor games. It has large fields for outdoor sports. It also has an eco-park, pool, laboratories, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The evergreen Malnadian review .
reviews.review_text: The labs and classrooms are just attractive; they are maintained very cleanly to make students comfortable. When we think about the hostel, they offer the students hygiene and provide sufficient foods that are liked by the students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MCE - Malnad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average when compared to other colleges. It has pretty much space but no good building labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi, library is available with good networking conditions. Food in hostel is average and in canteen also average. Sports and games are played.

reviews.review_heading: Lecturers are absolute psychopaths. You cannot gain good marks to go to higher studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good and free. You can sneak into the hostel. Not too strict. But not too free; you also need to be careful. Also, the food is not bad. It's just okay. There is no Wi-Fi on campus. You cannot just use it. The library is full of couples. No sports, no games, and no medical facilities (bad response during the COVID-19 outbreak in the hostel).

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is unexplainable. In our hostel, quality food is provided. We should pay yearly for our hostel. Rooms and toilets are good. Cleanliness is maintained throughout the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you can pressure then only join this college.
reviews.review_text:
Management is not good here, they are irresponsible and they don't provide us with the food of good taste. The hostel foods are 
Tasteless. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided in our college but it is of no use, it doesn't work properly if asked they say that it is in repair condition.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a big campus. It has good teaching quality.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are adequate for first-year students only. Average, repeated food is given daily. Our hostel is clean, and they will fix any problems within a reasonable amount of time. Our hostel has schedules that say we should be back in the hostel by 8:00 p.m. I don't like the faculty of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to join.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but it has poor maintenance. We have a very large campus but it is not good. Wi-Fi is available in our college but its poor. Its speed is not good. Only a few sports facilities are available in our college. Our college management should focus on sports. It should provide VTU-level sports.

college_info.college_name: MCE - Malnad College of Engineering

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about MCE - Malnad College of Engineering

likes.text: Some of the top recruiting companies include Benz, Bosch, Accenture, Soorya, Persistent and TCS.
Pretty good, very good companies will come to pick us, our faculty members also encourage us to learn about new things which will help us in placement time.

likes.text: Our college infrastructure was good with all amenities including Wi-Fi, computer labs, machine labs, high-voltage labs, a sports ground and much more.
The hostel has clean rooms, excellent food service, and excellent security throughout the college and hostel.

likes.text: As I said earlier, the faculty members are very good, and we have the most experienced faculty members mainly in mechanical, CS, and many other departments.
One of the best ways to improve the quality of teaching in a classroom is the teachers should guide students to be active learners rather than simply be spectators.

likes.text: Overall, the Malnad college is very good with its curriculum and infrastructure but needs to be modernised.
There are many clubs here where they conduct the fest and participant's from different college participate here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of the distance from the college to the railway station.

review_content.Placements: I am in the mechanical branch, so there are no placements for our branch. For the IT branch, only 2 companies visit our college for the placements. Hardly 2 or 3 students get placed, and that too they did not get placed in an MNC company. Students were hoping to get placed in MNC, but they got placed in a small organisation.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food served in the canteen is average, and students used to eat that only because there was no other option rather than going to the station back, which is 5 kilometres from our college. The infrastructure of our college is great. Wi-Fi facility is available only in some areas. The library is the only perfect thing in the college. Labs do not have proper instruments, as shown in the brochure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Teachers are helpful, but there are no placements.

review_content.Placements: In our mechanical engineering course, there are about 60 students. Our college didn't conduct placements, and not even a single company visits our college for placements. Our college doesn't provide internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good number of facilities like Wi-Fi, etc., but mostly Wi-Fi is available only for computer labs. Our college has facilities for our top courses like CAD-CAM, machine shop and every other practical subject's lab. There are a library, computer labs and also other practical labs. The hostel is pretty good, and the quality of the food served in the mess is also pretty decent. Other than this, medical facilities are also available. They provide us space for almost all sports and games.

review_summary.college_name: B. R. Harne College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I don't recommend this college. It's better to choose another college in Thane.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are very bad. Don't even expect to get knowledge in our college. We had to go and wander everywhere looking for a job. But we had no knowledge. Then we had to take another course from a training institute, and then, after that, we got a job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good but not well-maintained. Our college is far from the station.
content.Faculty: Some teachers do not respond to text messages. They will not even direct you in any other direction. Our HOD even blocked a college group for those 3 years (DSE) of degree work. Please don't go to college after Thane. Do not list them. Even if you get them, you won't even go to college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college because the faculty members help a lot in orals and unit tests.

content.Placements: As it was a newly established college, mostly placements will be from nearby small companies. As college was situated in the village area, and none of the companies try to visit there. Students can try off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for hostel was good. But hostel was 1-2 Km far from the college. It provides bus facility and will be picked up and dropped daily. The building was good and fully glass finish. The washrooms were good, and it feels like premium homes. Most of the students were impressed with washrooms.
content.Faculty: Faculty members for mechanical engineering were average, and depends on how many students were attending the lecture. Many students mostly bunk the college due to train timings. As the college was situated 4 km away from nearby Vangani Station, and train timings had a 1-hour gap after each train. So most students go early as they come from far places.

content.Infrastructure: The food served in the canteen is average, and students used to eat that only because there was no other option rather than going to the station back, which is 5 kilometres from our college. Labs do not have proper instruments, as shown in the brochure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with no placement, average teachers. Canteen is not good with a shortage of light.

content.Placements: There is no placement and salary package in this college. None of the companies visits our college. Nothing is good here.
content.Infrastructure: The college is in the forest, and there is nothing around the college. For a printout, we have to go to the station, which is 11 km away from college. Canteen is average, and sports and gym are also not available here. In the starting, there was no medical facility. However, due to medical college, there are some medical facilities, but they are also average. There are no lab assistants, and machines for practicals are also not good. There is no parking. Bikes or cars get dirty because of the dust and slush around the college. There is no proper computer lab, and not a single computer works properly. There are viruses on every computer. Only staff members computers are good.

facilities: Analysis of Algorithm and Graphics Lab
