reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college. It's better to choose another college in Thane.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but not well-maintained. Our college is far from the station.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because the faculty members help a lot in orals and unit tests.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for hostel was good. But hostel was 1-2 Km far from the college. It provides bus facility and will be picked up and dropped daily. The building was good and fully glass finish. The washrooms were good, and it feels like premium homes. Most of the students were impressed with washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the distance from the college to the railway station.
reviews.review_text: The food served in the canteen is average, and students used to eat that only because there was no other option rather than going to the station back, which is 5 kilometres from our college. The infrastructure of our college is great. Wi-Fi facility is available only in some areas. The library is the only perfect thing in the college. Labs do not have proper instruments, as shown in the brochure.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Teachers are helpful, but there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: There is a good number of facilities like Wi-Fi, etc., but mostly Wi-Fi is available only for computer labs. Our college has facilities for our top courses like CAD-CAM, machine shop and every other practical subject's lab. There are a library, computer labs and also other practical labs. The hostel is pretty good, and the quality of the food served in the mess is also pretty decent. Other than this, medical facilities are also available. They provide us space for almost all sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with no placement, average teachers. Canteen is not good with a shortage of light.
reviews.review_text: The college is in the forest, and there is nothing around the college. For a printout, we have to go to the station, which is 11 km away from college. Canteen is average, and sports and gym are also not available here. In the starting, there was no medical facility. However, due to medical college, there are some medical facilities, but they are also average. There are no lab assistants, and machines for practicals are also not good. There is no parking. Bikes or cars get dirty because of the du...

reviews.review_heading: The college is not very good to get an education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There are a canteen, gym and many things available in college. The college has its ground, and grade area which looks good. There is a seminar hall where a regularly good seminar and education lecture are held.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spread over 11 acres. It has a beautiful infrastructure. Canteens are available on the ground floor. There are four to five classrooms, each having a capacity of accommodating 100 students. The college has a gym and indoor games like carrom, chess etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college has excellent infrastructure and surroundings, but I'm dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. The Wi-Fi facility is provided on the campus. Classrooms in the college are good and clean. The library is excellent. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games competitions are average. Food quantity served in the canteen is good, but the quality is below average. There is no official college hostel available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is almost good. Classrooms are huge here. Labs are also available with required machinery and equipment. Wi-Fi is provided only in some areas like canteen, library, and labs. The college doesn't provide any hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: This college is definitely not going to help you build your career as there are no placements here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The infrastructure is the only aspect in which the college scores its best. Labs are well designed and well-equipped. The canteen is below average with only a few varieties of food. The labs in the mechanical department are well equipped with a a separate shop floor.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure of our college is good, but the education provided is not much good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has well-furnished classrooms and computer labs along with very good Wi-Fi connectivity. The college has a very good library with ample amount of books. The canteen is not much good, so it is better for the students to prefer to bring food from home than opting for canteen food.

reviews.review_heading: One can get a great environment to study here, only if there was good staff to support the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is good, but never choose a college based on its infrastructure because the infrastructure of any college is built by mainly using the money of students they charge as a fine or as development fees. As one can see, B. R. HARNE is an example of such colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good with structure, average with maintenance.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient classrooms, and library, annual functions and events are all good. The workshop quality is good for mechanical students. The canteen food quality is okay. There is a problem of load shading on Friday in the entire area. The cleaning is average. Non-teaching staff are less helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty members.
reviews.review_text: In our college, very strong Wi-Fi is there in the whole campus. The labs are very clean, and the library is also very peaceful. The medical facilities are also there. The students play the sports and games. Our canteen food is very tasty or non-hygienist. Our college hostel is very clean, and students can stay and study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Simply best if you're interested in studying and can understand the concepts taught by teachers.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of this college is good and the best.
The toilets are like in 5* hotels.
The college has no free Wi-Fi.
Labs are too good and cleanliness is maintained.
The library is almost good to get enough books you want in engineering.
Nearby, there are no medical facilities till almost approx. 4 km from the college.
Every year, the college arranges Technoblast in which sports and robots competitions are held.

highlights.summary: The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

college_info.intro:
The flagship course of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology, Pragatinagar (ABVGIET) is its BE/BTech course which is extended at UG level. Students can choose betweent a total of 3 specialisations for the course including Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, and Electrical Engineering. The institute is also planning a 4th specialisation in Civil Engineering, though this is still tenative.
The college extends the course with affiliation to Himachal Pradesh Technical University and admissions are based on the university's entrance exam or HPCET. But admissions through JEE Mains are also accepted. Students must also meet the eligibility criteria of passing Class 12 and 12 with an aggregate score of 45% in the Science stream.
The ABVGIET Himachal Pradesh fee structure for BE/BTech has a tuition fee between INR 1.2 Lakhs and INR 2.19 Lakhs with the total course fee including other charges and fees. Also, female candidates receive fee waivers or concessions in the tuition fees. Interested students can check the ABVGIET Gumma popular programmes:

review_summary.college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My college life - Career Defining.

content.Placements: Around 40 percent of students were placed. The highest package was 7 Lacs, average package 4 Lacs, and the lowest was around 3 LPA. The companies that conduct placement drives in our campus are mostly from nearby Chandigarh, and only 3-4 companies visit here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was outstanding. Wi-Fi was available throughout the whole campus, and every student was given a 1GB limit per day. Labs and classrooms were very learning-friendly. The library was good for studying peacefully. The food available in the mess was limited, but medical facilities and sports were also good in college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Average poor placements and infrastructure is also average.

content.Placements: Only about 10 students were interested in getting a job. They were placed for interviews, and about half of them got placed. The highest package was Rs. 2.5 lakh per annum, and the top recruiting company was Krishna Maruti. The roles offered were for junior engineer trainees.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and a good library. There are labs for every branch of study. The college only has girls hostels, and the food is not good at all. Sports and tournaments are held at the college. In 2023, our college participated in kabbadi and badminton tournaments. The college provided the kits for the tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A government college is not up to the mark.

content.Placements: Not even a single placement company was invited to the campus. There wasn't even a placement cell in the campus. All the students of the batch went for off-campus interviews and then got jobs. No internship was provided by the college. No roles were offered.
content.Infrastructure: There was no hostel for boys on the campus. There was a hostel for girls. The campus was not very big. There were only 2 labs. Wi-Fi also was not present in the college. There was a canteen in the college, but it was not good. Sports were not promoted in the college.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology .

content.Placements: Many students get placed in companies like Wipro, Tech Mahindra, VT Technology, Scope Telecom, etc. Placements depend on the qualities and knowledge of students. Students are selected according to their performance in college events and semester exams.
content.Infrastructure: Different lawns are available in our college for students to learn practicals. Classrooms are well maintained. They have projectors to promote e-learning for students. It has a huge library with a great variety of books. Wi-Fi is available for faculty members and students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: About 7% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 2.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Bebo and XenonStack. Almost 30% of students got internships from our college in companies like Bebo, Hoping Minds, Talentelgia, etc. Top roles offered are preparing estimates and budgets, creating accurate project specifications, designing engineering experiments, and creating technical reports for customers.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like laptops, cameras, printers, projectors, etc. Students can access all these facilities. Wi-Fi is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college life - Career Defining.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was outstanding. Wi-Fi was available throughout the whole campus, and every student was given a 1GB limit per day. Labs and classrooms were very learning-friendly. The library was good for studying peacefully. The food available in the mess was limited, but medical facilities and sports were also good in college.

reviews.review_heading: Average poor placements and infrastructure is also average.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and a good library. There are labs for every branch of study. The college only has girls hostels, and the food is not good at all. Sports and tournaments are held at the college. In 2023, our college participated in kabbadi and badminton tournaments. The college provided the kits for the tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: A government college is not up to the mark.
reviews.review_text: There was no hostel for boys on the campus. There was a hostel for girls. The campus was not very big. There were only 2 labs. Wi-Fi also was not present in the college. There was a canteen in the college, but it was not good. Sports were not promoted in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology .
reviews.review_text: Different lawns are available in our college for students to learn practicals. Classrooms are well maintained. They have projectors to promote e-learning for students. It has a huge library with a great variety of books. Wi-Fi is available for faculty members and students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities like laptops, cameras, printers, projectors, etc. Students can access all these facilities. Wi-Fi is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Government Institute of Engineering and Technology can be considered to join.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is still under construction, but all the labs are provided. Classrooms are good. The library has Wi-Fi as well. For girls, the hostel provides good food, and all the other facilities are available. A playground is available. The canteen and auditorium are under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a poor location, facilities, and medical services.
reviews.review_text: There is no medical facility nearby the institute, and the condition of the canteen is very poor. This is a combined college containing B.Tech Polytechnic and ITI, but there is a common chemistry lab, and the condition of this lab is so poor that there is a lack of instruments.

reviews.review_heading: Many of the students are placed and have the best quality placements.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi labs with good quality computers and other equipment. Wi-Fi is available on campus for studying. The library is there. Many books and newspapers are found there in the library. The library and canteen facilities are also very good. A sports meet is done in each semester. Many sports-related activities are held there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that good but provides most of the facilities such as Wi-Fi, better labs, and classrooms. Our college has only one canteen, which is below average. There is no medical facility. Even a few sports material is available. There is no boys hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is developing day by day. The college is good and faculty members are also very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has facilities like digital learning with Wi-Fi and a library. The lab equipment are very good. We have both indoor and outdoor sports. Hostel management is very well designed and provides many facilities. There is no hostel for boys, but there are two hostels for girls.

reviews.review_heading: ABVGIET is best college in HPTU University.
reviews.review_text: Our college has facilities like digital learning with Wi-Fi and a library. The lab equipment is very good. In sports, we have both indoors and outdoors. Hostel management is very well designed and provides good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a good placement in 2020, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: Different labs are available for students to learn practically. The classrooms are well-maintained and also have projectors that promote students for e-learning. A huge library is available with a great variety of books. Wi-Fi is available for faculty and students. Sports and games are available for students in the college. A canteen is also present inside the campus. Hostel facilities are available only for girls.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment for study and placements take place in 2021 and 2022.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility available on campus is not good. There is only girls hostel in the institute and no boys hostel facility in the institute. But a new building is being constructed for the hostel. The classrooms are good. Wi-Fi service is also available. There are no medical facilities available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because our batch had good placements percentage.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is not good because of its classrooms, and there is not proper lighting in class and the canteen is in too bad condition. Playground is also not in good condition and encouragement towards sports is not promoted in college.

reviews.review_heading: The campus should be improved.
reviews.review_text:
Different labs are available for students to learn practically. The classrooms are well maintained and also have projectors that promote students for e-learning.
A huge library is available with a great variety of books.
Wi-Fi is available for faculty and students. Sports and games are available for students in the college. A canteen is also present inside the campus. Hostel facilities are available only for girls.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gulzar Group of Institutes (GGI) offers UG, PG and Diploma courses across several specialisations. Additionally, it offers more than 10 programmes in Engineering, Computer Applications, Business Studies, Hotel Management, and Allied Health Sciences, among many others. Admission to these courses is based on merit scores. All the programmes are offered in full-time mode. The fees for various programmes may vary based on the type and level of the program. All the programmes are offered in affiliation with the Punjab Technical University. Candidates can take a look below at the Gulzar Group of Institutes courses, fees and eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    The institute offers the UG and PG level BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, etc. To get admitted to GGI, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. faqs.question: Who is eligible for Gulzar Group of Institutes admission?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into Gulzar Group of Institutes for an MBA course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students must pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserve category). Gulzar Group of Institutes offers full-time MBA courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on merit. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass graduation (common eligibility).
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to MBA at Gulzar Group of Institutes?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MBA course at Gulzar Group of Institutes, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is merit-based and candidates must pass graduation. The duration of the course is two years spread over four semesters.

reviews_list.review_title: They provided the best facilities for their students.

review_content.Placements: According to me, 90% of students got jobs in different companies. They earned a good income because the GGI teachers taught very well. Some students went abroad for their further studies. At that time, I was confused about which course would be best for me, so JP sir suggested I do the BCA course. Now I am an employee of Ganga Acrowool Limited Company.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provided many facilities like labs, AC classrooms, a library, and a clean environment. I liked their facilities. They also provided neat and clean food in the mess. Medical facilities, sports, and games were also available. They provided a better internet.

review_summary.college_name: Gulzar Group of Institutes Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb 2026) - Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good and beautiful colleges are situated in Khanna. Good study facilities and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Lots of placement cells and facilities for students. Every year, so many got placed from Gulzar Group of Institutes. The companies coming for placements are so good and offer good income for our future. Most of the companies like Infosys, Allunumeric, etc., visit the campus.
content.Infrastructure: My course is BCA and it's so good in my college. Every week, we attended the labs for our practical knowledge learning. The staff is so talented that they provide us with better and good course knowledge. I'm also a hosteler, and the hostel is so clear and beautiful.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely amazing staff work performance, not only calculated by studies.

content.Placements: Practical knowledge and coding skills were offered in this course. Recruiting companies were Accenture, Jio, Wipro, Quantum, Zun Pulse, Amazon, Solitaire Infosys, Qspiders, Vprotech, TCS, Cognizant, Microsoft, Google, Ceasefire, HCL Technologies, Maantech Technologies, Airtel, Vodafone, and Walmart.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had fully furnished labs, classrooms, and proper arrangements for chemistry and physical instruments. All classrooms had AC. Cold and hot water facilities were available according to the weather. Hostel fee was affordable. Sports day celebration was held. Gaming activities were held for two weeks. Mess and canteen food were well-made and clean. It had affordable prices in canteens. Medical facilities were available. Every month, a body checkup was done. Blood donation camps were there. All types of books were available in libraries. Well-made washrooms were available.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb 2026) - Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: They provided the best facilities for their students.

content.Placements: According to me, 90% of students got jobs in different companies. They earned a good income because the GGI teachers taught very well. Some students went abroad for their further studies. At that time, I was confused about which course would be best for me, so JP sir suggested I do the BCA course. Now I am an employee of Ganga Acrowool Limited Company.
content.Infrastructure: They provided many facilities like labs, AC classrooms, a library, and a clean environment. I liked their facilities. They also provided neat and clean food in the mess. Medical facilities, sports, and games were also available. They provided a better internet.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is the best. All facilities are provided to students and teachers are good.

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in our course. The highest package of my college is 10 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Different companies visit our college for placements. In my college, the top courses offered are the B.Tech (CSE) and the Diploma course. 80% of students get internships in different companies.
content.Infrastructure: My college provides all facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, comfortable classrooms, and the library. The mess food is of average quality. It completely provides medicines, sports, and games. My college hostel facilities are average, and students do not easily get rooms.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb 2026) - B.Sc. in Medical Lab Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our department was not introduced in 2015.

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed in my course. All get the same package of 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are hospitals. About 70% of students got internships in my course and they will get paid internships. They pay to hospitals to go and learn there. The lab technician role is offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, projectors, and screens are provided in my department. They provide labs like microbiology lab, biochemistry, and anatomy lab. In the hostel, they provide Wi-Fi. The quality of the food is not good in the hostel mess. Our department organises many sports like cricket and football.

admission_process.title: Gulzar Group of Institutes Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Gulzar Group of Institutesadmission 2025is open for various courses. The institute offers the UG and PG level courses such as BTech, BSc, BBA, MBA, etc. To get admitted to GGI, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers diploma in CSE. The institute offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. The application process atGulzar Group of Institutesis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutGulzar Group of Institutescourse admission2025.

Gulzar Group of Institutes admission 2025is merit-based. The institute offers more than 10 courses in various streams (including specialisations) such as Engineering, Science, Management, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutGulzar Group of Institutes course admissions2025:
Particulars
Gulzar Group of Institutes Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.
Read More:GGI Brochure

GGI admissions are based on merit. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Candidates are selected base don merit for all the courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularGulzar Group of Institutes courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate withPhysics, Mathematics, andChemistry
Class 12 from a board recognised
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate from a board recognised
Graduate with a 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry, plus Mathematics or Biology from a recognised board.
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate
Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Gulzar Group of Institutes is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Gulzar Group of Institutes Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website, i.e., https://ggi.ac.in for admission to the various programme. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on merit. For the final selection, it also considers the candidates' academic performance.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theGulzar Group of Institutes feeto confirm their seats in the institute.

faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Gulzar Group of Institutes. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. courses_data.description: At the PG level, Gulzar Group of Institutes provides a two yearsMBAto the students. Gulzar Group of Institutes MBA offered is spread over four semesters. Students seeking admission must have passing scores in their past qualifying degree or equivalent.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to MBA course at Gulzar Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: For admission to the MBA course at Gulzar Group of Institutes, students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course is merit-based and candidates must pass graduation. The duration of the course is two years spread over four semesters.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MBA at Gulzar Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: For MBA course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Aspirants should pass graduation with a minimum 50% aggregate. The admission criteria for the course is Merit-based. The Full Form of MBA is Master of Business Administration which is a two-year PG degree designed to equip students with advanced skills and knowledge in business management and leadership.

faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to MBA at Gulzar Group of Institutes?
faqs.answer: To get into Gulzar Group of Institutes for an MBA course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students must pass graduation with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserve category). Gulzar Group of Institutes offers full-time MBA courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on merit. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass graduation (common eligibility).

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Gulzar Group of Institutes?

The institute admits students based on merit for all UG and PG courses.  Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. placement_data.title: Gulzar Group of Institutes Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Corporate Resource Center (CRC) at GGI plays a crucial role in bridging the gap between academia and industry by fostering career counselling, skill development, and strong industry connections. It serves as a dedicated platform by providing students with successful careers and equipping them to meet the demands of the ever-evolving corporate world.

The 2024 GGI placements concluded with 82% of students placed . The highest package offered to MBA , BTech , and other courses was INR 17 LPA . In addition to this, the total count of participating companies was above 425 , including over 150 prime recruiters. The total count of placements made to the students was over 780 .

library.description: The library has the capacity to accommodate about 200 students at a time. The college provides high speed leased line (8 Maps) internet facility with WWI connection and audio-visual facility. The library has a growing collection of over 12,000 books (Text, References, and General). The periodical section subscribes to 90 peer-reviewed, world-acclaimed journals and 30 magazines (Technical and general) along with the prominent news dailies. The Digital Library has 21 well-equipped computer systems and more than 250 CD ROMs on various technical subjects. We also provide e-leaming and DELNET programmes to students for accessing presentations, seminars, lectures and share open-source information on the web.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college is good for placement and studies, but not good for anything else.

review_content.Placements: I am from the computer science and engineering branch, and there is a huge demand for placements. Till recently, the percentage of students who got placed was nearly 80 percent. The highest package offered is 46 LPA, and the average package offered is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Cisco, Accenture, Deloitte, Goldman Sachs, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and canteen food is good. The hostel food is very bad. Hostels do not have AC. There is low Wi-Fi in the hostel. They intentionally made bad food in the hostel, so that students get food from the canteen, the sake bell, and Frank's shop. We also have a milkshake shop.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied about the curriculum I chose, good placements and organized infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The percent of students placed is more than 400. As I am studying in artificial intelligence and machine learning course, I would be saying that placements will start from 3-2 semester. The highest package is 32 LPA and AceEng is a tier 3 college, so opportunities will be from Infosys, etc. So many students got internships from the domains they chose and the top roles are SDE roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and well organized. The quality of food, and labs are rating of 5/5.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and knowledgeable as they have 5+ years experience in the subject they teach and the quality is 5/5. The curriculum and almanac are well organized and based on that lectures happened. Coming to the semester exams, we have to learn the concept instead of by-harting it, then only we can write any paper in the semester exam.

review_summary.college_name: ACE Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Above average college and to be improved in some aspects.

content.Placements: The highest package is in Amazon of 46 LPA. Companies like Amazon, Pega, Zeta, Cisco, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Salesforce, Cognizant, HSBC and so on, up to 20 companies, visit the college. Courses offered are CSE (AI & ML, DA, IoT, CSE), IT, ECE, EEE, CE, ME. An average of 30 percent of students are placed every year from all branches. The average package is 3.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college consists of central library, canteen, placement & training cell, girls hostel, boys hostel, auditorium, gym, workshops for ME and CE, park in middle, practice nets, 2 blocks for all departments with all lab equipment and large ground. Health center with 2 beds and Wi-Fi is provided in the whole campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good college for average-ranked students in EAPCET.

content.Placements: It's very nice, and in 2025, we got the highest placement of 49 LPA at Amazon by our senior (female). The average placement in our college is 7 to 8 LPA. We should prepare and develop our skills for nice placement and nice companies. We should develop skills is the main thing.
content.Infrastructure: Okay, nice infrastructure, but many monkeys are here, and they suddenly come into the room. No network signal here except Airtel, and Wi-Fi will sometimes turn off. Very cool water in the early morning, and it's difficult to bathe in the early morning and hostel maintenance is average.

placement_report.college_name: ACE Engineering College Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: ACE Engineering College Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: As per the latest report, 8 recruiters participated and presented 29 placement offers to the BTech batch 2025 so far. The highest package offered so far to the batch 2025 stood at INR 13.20 LPA . ACE Engineering College released the placement details for the Class of 2024. As per the report, the highest and average package offered during ACE Engineering College placements in 2024 was INR 17.8 LPA and INR 4.30 LPA , respectively. Further, 55 recruiters participated and presented 585 placement offers to the BTech batch 2025. The top recruiters of ACE Engineering College in 2024 placements included Amazon, Accenture, Intellipaat, Hexaware, TCS, Cisco, Pega System, IBM, Deloitte, Cognizant, etc.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at ACE Engineering College during placements?
faqs.answer: ACE Engineering College offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Frontizo Business Services Pvt Ltd, Dimple Advisory Pvt Ltd, Topline Computers, India Running, Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Indusnet Techshu, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd, Lithium Urban Technology, Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, 3D Logic.

faqs.question: Are there any networking events and mentorship opportunities offered at ACE Engineering College?
faqs.answer: ACE Engineering College campus is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, and offers a safe environment to students. The college offers all the essential facilities for students, including academic blocks, a library, collaboration spaces, a café, a convenience store, etc. ACE Engineering College has a vibrant campus life. The college helps students to witness a panoply of diverse cultural, clubbing, and community activities during the time they spent here. Further, ACE Engineering College also organises networking events and provides mentorship opportunities to students.

faqs.question: What is the median placement salary offered to the students of ACE Engineering College?
faqs.answer: The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the ACE Engineering College is INR 2.94 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.

description: ACE Engineering College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to various courses at the UG & PG levels. To check the cutoff details for different exams, rounds and categories, refer to the sections provided below. Candidates can check this page to view the ACE Engineering College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

ACE Engineering College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 8911 and 58226 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Information Technology was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing rank for the same stood at 28800. For ot

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Information Technology, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 8911, 22828 and 23801, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to ACE Engineering College. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

reviews.review_heading: Above average college and to be improved in some aspects.
reviews.review_text: The college consists of central library, canteen, placement & training cell, girls hostel, boys hostel, auditorium, gym, workshops for ME and CE, park in middle, practice nets, 2 blocks for all departments with all lab equipment and large ground. Health center with 2 beds and Wi-Fi is provided in the whole campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for average-ranked students in EAPCET.
reviews.review_text: Okay, nice infrastructure, but many monkeys are here, and they suddenly come into the room. No network signal here except Airtel, and Wi-Fi will sometimes turn off. Very cool water in the early morning, and it's difficult to bathe in the early morning and hostel maintenance is average.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for placement and studies, but not good for anything else.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and canteen food is good. The hostel food is very bad. Hostels do not have AC. There is low Wi-Fi in the hostel. They intentionally made bad food in the hostel, so that students get food from the canteen, the sake bell, and Frank's shop. We also have a milkshake shop.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied about the curriculum I chose, good placements and organized infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well organized. The quality of food, and labs are rating of 5/5.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum I chose, good placements, and organised infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well-organised. I would rate 5 out of 5 for the quality of food and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well-organized. The quality of food, faculty, and labs is rated 5/5.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum I chose. It has good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well organised. I would rate 5 out of 5 for the quality of food, faculty members, and labs.

reviews.review_heading: Good academics and decent facilities with supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: My course/department has well-developed facilities. It supports both academic learning and practical exposure. Classrooms are having projectors, comfortable seating, and good ventilation. The entire department is Wi-Fi enabled. It allows students to access online learning resources without any interruption. Laboratories are well-maintained. It is updated with the equipment required for practical learning. The department library has good reference books, journals, and digital learning resources. ...

reviews.review_heading: It is not highly recommended for freshers.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small and far from the main city of Hyderabad. Along with bad transport facilities to the college. College hostels are messy, and the food is not good. Sports facilities are decent. The quality of the faculty is bad. Wi-Fi is present but cannot be accessed. Labs and classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is decent and vibrant.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent for our course. We have poor classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi, and a good library that helps while studying. The campus is clean and well-maintained. I don't stay in the hostel, but seniors say the rooms and food are nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the curriculum, the good placements, and the organized infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well organized. The quality of food, faculty, and labs is rated 5/5.

reviews.review_heading: Decent campus. Life is bright.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent for our course. We have poor classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi and a good library that helps while studying. The campus is clean and well-maintained. I don't stay in the hostel, but seniors say the rooms and food are nice.

reviews.review_heading: My college review of ACE Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, and the campus environment is good. I suggest that one should consider our college as a good benchmark. We had good food in the canteen, and the facilities were good, considering our college is in a city. Hostel facilities are good, we have good ventilation, fans, beds and rooms were cleaned properly.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with a great environment and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great, with trees around. Everything is installed, from Wi-Fi to a high-class library. The hostel facilities are also good. It has good-tasting and hygienic food. A big playground for sports. A campus canteen is installed.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: It's located in a peaceful, natural environment so that no distractions or disturbance can occur. Separate blocks for separate branches, a seminar hall, and auditorium, personalized desks in the laboratory. Consisting of an open gym and hostel facilities with good food.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and culture here.

content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in 2024, with 3,304 students placed in the last three years. The highest package is INR 45 LPA, with some reviews mentioning packages up to INR 36 LPA. reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is quite good, and new hostels have been built this year for 1st-year students. Facilities are also good, like Wi-Fi and a large number of labs. There is also a huge library. Hostels are quite good, but facilities in the mess are most likely bad.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. It has good placements and well-educated teachers.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities are available here. Grounds are available for games like basketball, cricket, volleyball, and football. A gym is available, and Wi-Fi is also available in a hostel. The college also provides a hospital. The canteen food is very good. Medical facilities are also provided. All types of sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper facilities provided for students. The Wi-Fi facility is available only in the library. The hostel facilities are decent. They conduct only annual functions and games. Our institute labs are very outdated. Most of the instruments not working properly.

reviews.review_heading: ITM University: Where dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and lush green. There is a beautiful culture at almost every corner of our college. Labs are equipped with a Wi-Fi facility. The quality of the canteen food is awesome. The library is also very good and has many books and novels.

reviews.review_heading: Overall good but not recommendable.
reviews.review_text: We have smart boards in our classrooms and labs. The library has systems as well as an individual table to study with privacy. The hostel is okay. The facility is not up to the mark. We have a cycle in our hostel. We have a gym, stationery, and many facilities. A warden is also there.

reviews.review_heading: College provides students opportunity to get a job and faculty members are supportive.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. We get is lots and lots of trees and an open area. We have a cafe for break time. Canteen food is moderate and not very much good. Medical facilities are also good we have a good experience in the medical system and good doctors are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I have to say that nowadays college is not value for money because there is no culture.
reviews.review_text: ITM University's infrastructure is very low quality and this is a waste of money in terms of infrastructure. There is no library available for students for hassle-free study. Hostel fees are expensive but infrastructure is right and less water and no security for students.

reviews.review_heading: Experience of College in My Life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. The classrooms are a bit old, and they do not have that good facilities. Students suffer, especially in summers, because there are no air-conditioned classrooms. The quality of facilities in the hostel is normal, and the quality of food is sometimes good, but it is just like a normal mess, which is not that good. The canteen is also normal. Medical facilities and sports are also average.

reviews.review_heading: Overall everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are okay. We don't have a proper Wi-Fi connection, but we have data cables in our labs to connect our laptops or personal devices. Classrooms are okay. Lab facilities are good. We have a proper library on our campus. We have proper medical facilities in our college and hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The satisfaction in our college is that one girl got a 45 Lacs package at Microsoft.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities are good enough. Every course has a separate class and department for their study. A proper section is available for every subject. Labs are available for practical. A library is available for study, and books are also available for study. 
The hostel facilities are available for other state students. The quality of food is good and fresh. A canteen and Nescafe are also available. The medical facilities are also proper. A hospital is there. Sports and games are also played at a na...

reviews.review_heading: ITM University come under top colleges in Madhya Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available in the girls' hostel but not in the boys' hostel. Labs are well settled. There is proper cleanliness in every lab and in every classroom. The campus is green and well-settled.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure is overall good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good. Campus has full Wi-Fi access everywhere. Classrooms are good, and library is very helpful. Hostel facilities are average, and quality of food in hostel mess is also average. Campus has excellent medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really bad college with bad students and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. The college and hostel are not hygienic; the washrooms are not cleaned daily. The labs don't have Wi-Fi, and the classrooms do not have even the minimum requirements, such as fans and lights. It is very bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CSE in ITM Gwalior.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are well and good. Labs are in good condition and contain modern and updated systems. Classrooms are decent and equipped with projectors, smart boards, and AC. There's a slight issue related to Wi-Fi and the network. Hostel facilities are good. Hostel charges vary according to choice: 2-seater (without AC or cooler) = 1,00,000 (per year), 2-seater (with AC) = 1,15,000 (per year), 3-seater (without AC) = 90,000 (per year), 3-seater (with AC) = 1,05,000 (per year). Hostel charges m...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about School of Engineering and Technology, ITM University, Gwalior

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Government College of Engineering, Salem has an impressive review rating of 4.2 by 119 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Government College of Engineering, Salem?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government College of Engineering, Salem offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Government College of Engineering, Salem courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Government College of Engineering, Salem courses stands around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Government College of Engineering, Salem is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Government College of Engineering, Salem are Civil Engineering, Communications Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do Government College of Engineering, Salem offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can pursue a B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) at Government College of Engineering (GCE) Salem through part-time mode. The course is a 4-year undergraduate program at the UG level, admitting 60 students, with a total tuition fee of INR 2.00 Lakh. The program requires applicants to meet the entry requirements of 75% in 12th grade.Additionally, the course offers practical problem-solving skills, advanced hardware/software design skills, and industry-standard tools and technologies.
faqs.question: Can I pursue B.E. in EEE at Government College of Engineering, Salem through part time mode?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A really cost effective college with good environment and absolutely good lecturers.

review_content.Placements: Usually, the percentage is about 75-100%. The highest salary is around 30 LPA while average and the lowest are 15 LPA and 5 LPA respectively. Top recruiting companies are Hyundai, Ford, etc. The percentage of students who get internships is about 50-80%. Top roles would be NLC Limited, Steel Plant in Salem, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-equipped for their respective department. It's a quiet place, I won't say it's well-equipped for the hostel. But considering the cost, I guess it's enough. For the students, it is the best environment for studies. It's a vegetarian college (don't like that).

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college gives independency to students.

review_content.Placements: The Mechanical Department has a 100 percent placement rate. The highest package is 13.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.16 LPA. L&T, Sona Comstar, and পেট্রোল are the top companies. Fifty percent of our college students get internships. Our top placement is as a manager in Sona Comstar.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good for the students. It is connected to nature. The buildings are old but in good condition. There is a cafeteria for students and also a store on the campus. The cafe has all the food items. There are two hostels, one for boys and another one for girls. review_summary.college_name: Government College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with my college life.

content.Placements: The college is located in Salem, which is one of the tier 2 cities in the state. The company's exposure is a little bit small. Placements are very good. Many companies visit the college to hire students. In the last 3 consecutive years, 100% of placements have been provided in my department.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available here. The infrastructure is good, but it is a government college. Free Wi-Fi is available, and the labs are good. Classrooms have smartboards. The department library has all the books, and the digital library has an ocean of books. Food is average for both boys and girls. 6 blocks are available for the UG boys' hostel. For 3rd-year and 4th-year students, single rooms are available. The hostel has average facilities. The canteen is good. A big sports ground is here, and all games are available here. An indoor stadium is also present here.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience at GCE Salem: Pros, cons, and insights.

content.Placements: 299 out of 438, i.e., 63.3% of students got placed (graduated students). The highest package is about 15 LPA, and the average is about 3.5 LPA-4 LPA, and the lowest is about 1.5 LPA- 1.8 LPA. The top recruiters are Zoho, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, etc. The percentage of my courses is 100%. 95 out of 95 students got internships and the companies are Hyundai, JSW Steel, Hero Motocorp, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Since it is a government college, all the infrastructure and facilities required for students are available, such as free Wi-Fi and laboratory. Classrooms are equipped with 6 ceiling fans, and the college library, which has about 50000 books. The hostel is well-equipped with simple furniture, a separate cupboard, a ceiling fan, etc. As for the food, it is all vegetarian food available. As for the sports, we have hockey, cricket, football, and basketball fields separately, and we do have a gymnasium.

individual_reviews.title: A really cost effective college with good environment and absolutely good lecturers.

content.Placements: Usually, the percentage is about 75-100%. The highest salary is around 30 LPA while average and the lowest are 15 LPA and 5 LPA respectively. content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are well-equipped for their respective department. It's a quiet place, I won't say it's well-equipped for the hostel. But considering the cost, I guess it's enough. For the students, it is the best environment for studies. It's a vegetarian college (don't like that).

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college gives independency to students.

content.Placements: The Mechanical Department has a 100 percent placement rate. The highest package is 13.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2.16 LPA. L&T, Sona Comstar, and পেট্রোল are the top companies. Fifty percent of our college students get internships. Our top placement is as a manager in Sona Comstar.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good for the students. It is connected to nature. The buildings are old but in good condition. There is a cafeteria for students and also a store on the campus. The cafe has all the food items. There are two hostels, one for boys and another one for girls. Boys' hostel timing is 6-9, and girls' hostel timing is 6-6. The food quality in the hostel is average. There is also a medical center near the hostel office. There is a huge ground to play on.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Thermal Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.E. in Thermal Engineering Course.

content.Placements: Government College Of Engineering, Salem has a very good track record when it comes to placement rate. About 90% to 95% of students are admitted to top-ranking institutions. The highest offer for on-campus interviews is 30 LPA with an average of 15 LPA. The minimum package is 6 LPA. Top recruiters are Larsen & Toubro, Bajaj Energy, TVS Motor, etc. Top roles are Thermal safety officer, Thermal design engineer and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Our college system is the best, and it is still improving. Our college system is good for the educational mind. Our college has a library, and another one is under construction. Libraries and Wi-Fi are also available throughout the digital library. Hostel and mess food is also good. Other aspects of the college are also good. All campuses have Wi-Fi. Only college students and professors use Wi-Fi.

For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 4832 to 33352. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the Government College of Engineering, Salem BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. A health center is available inside the ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government College of Engineering, Salem.
reviews.review_text: Government College of Engineering in Salem has awesome infrastructure. The college has modern quality classrooms and laboratories. This college also has hostel facilities. Hostel foods are very hygienic and delicious. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Government College Of Engineering, Salem-11. A short summary on Metallurgical Engineering Course.
reviews.review_text: The metallurgical engineering department consists of a corrosion lab, a heat treatment laboratory, a lath workshop, and a mineral dressing laboratory. Free college Wi-Fi with a poor connection and a large library with digital learning. Hostel rooms are reasonably priced and serve excellent food.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning platform to develop more knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Soil mechanics lab, concrete lab, computer lab for AutoCAD, and strength of materials lab, survey lab, hydraulic machinery lab, planetarium, playground, library, alumni center, medical, canteen, physics lab, chemistry lab, EEE lab, computer lab for CSE students.

reviews.review_heading: GCE 24 Salem Best College.
reviews.review_text: The faciitities and infrastructure available for my course is very good. The quality of food provided in the hostel is excellent and mess facilities are available for each year students according to the year of study. The sports are okay and medical facilities are provided near the hostel office.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements.
reviews.review_text: The computer facilities are available in our department. Wi-Fi is also available along with a library in our department. The quality of food available in the mess is good and facilities are good. Medical facilities are available within the hostel campus. Sports activities are average.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Gce Salem.
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our college hostel. The quality of food provided in the mess is good and the mess menu is also pasted and circulated to students. The sports are average level. There are no canteen facilities in our college. There is a medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: The Freedom College. It gives me more freedom to create the world.
reviews.review_text: The college is old and the infrastructure is average. The college buildings are neat and clean. The free Wi-Fi in every place in my college. The Library is common and each department has a library. The labs are very advanced. The hostel has each year have separate hostels. The hostel food is average. The college has big grounds for sports. One canteen is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college in terms of study purposes.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Laboratories are excellent. There is a decent library in this college.

The university offers the BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Admissions to courses on both UG and PG level are merit as well as entrance based. faqs.answer: A:    Desh Bhagat University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university considers merit in the last qualifying exam to shortlist students for some of its courses. However, students are also selected based on valid score secured by them in the accepted entrance test. Some of the entrance-based courses are PhD, MBA, BDS, BAMS, etc. Hence, it is not as easy to categorise the university's admission into merit or entrance basis. Furthermore, the total costs for dental programs such as BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) at Desh Bhagat Dental College & Hospital amount to approximately INR 17.6 lakhs. When these values are compared to the normal range for MDS fees in India, which can range from INR 1,00,000 to INR 10,00,000 per year depending on the institution and specialization, pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University may be somewhat expensive.

The university offers 256+ professional courses across 50 streams like agriculture, applied science, ayurveda, business management and communication, dentistry, engineering, etc. at the undergraduate, post graduate and doctoral level approved by UGC, AIU, BCI, CCIM, NAAC, PCI, INC, PNRC Mohali, UN Academic Impact, NCTE, DCI, CSIR, etc. Besides this, the university also has several international collaborations including those with Universita Cattolica del Sacro Cuore, Milan; Sprott Shaw College, British Columbia and Marketing Institute of Singapore, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (BAMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is actually good, with good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placed. The highest package is 10 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. All students get internships. Roles like MO, AMO, and CMO are offered. Others also get some more placements in marketing and are opening their own hospital and clinics. Some students also join the Max and Apollo hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is great. It has Wi-Fi and a canteen. The mess food is good, and AC rooms are available too, with Wi-Fi, and cleaning is done properly. There is no power cut, and generators are available. It provides grounds and sports equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. Medical Laboratory Technology (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good.

content.Placements: 45 students were placed in my course of Rs.40,000. Our top recruiting companies in India were DR Lal PathLabs Limited, PathCare Diagnostics, AquaProbe Diagnostics, General Diagnostics, CRL Diagnostics, Nobel Diagnostics, SRL Diagnostics, WellCare Diagnostics, and Wellness Diagnostics.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were very good. Our labs, including biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology, were very well maintained, and the laboratory equipment was very well maintained. The canteen food quality was really appreciated, and the game facilities were also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Genuine review of Desh Bhagat University.

content.Placements: This year, 120 students took admission in Desh Bhagat University for a B.Tech in CSE. The placement rate is good, with an average package of 4 LPA, which is good for me. Many companies visit us. The top placement package was 23 LPA, and internships are held.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are cooperative, they always help us. There are hostel facilities provided at a reasonable cost. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university and hostel. Classrooms have projectors, and labs are conducted every day. There is a huge library as well.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's written that this is a university, but I don't think so because there is not much crowd in BDS.

content.Placements: About 100 students are available in our class, and the fees are taken from 10-12.5 lakh. Management quota fees are around 3 lakh. It is committed, so it is a good university as it is cheap, provides a degree so fast, and on time.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi available, and the labs are not well developed. The classrooms are good, but the library is not good. There are no collections of books. Hostels are good, but the mess food is not good as it is so hard and there is a fluctuation of menu. Sports facilities are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is nice.

content.Placements: Placements are not too good here in this course. Not many companies come here to hire students for work from this course. Students have to apply by themselves for some extra choices. Mostly 40 to 50 percent of students get jobs. The package is around 20 to 30 thousand per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is superb as there are so many buildings in good condition with well-maintained washrooms. The college campus has several gardens. It has different types of labs and a library also. The hostel also has a ground for playing and sitting. Mess food is also nice.

admission_process.title: Desh Bhagat University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Desh Bhagat University admission 2025is both entrance and merit-based. Formally known asDBU, it is a private university located in Punjab.Desh Bhagat Universityoffers programmes at various UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses in various streams such asScience, Law,Management, Teaching &Education, Design,IT & Software, Nursing,Arts, Engineering, and more. The university also has an international campus in Kenya. Candidates need to clear the entrance exam conducted by the university to get admission at Desh Bhagat University.

Desh Bhagat University admissions for PhD programme are over. However, students can apply for the UG and PG courses. All of the courses at Desh Bhagat University are offered through regular mode. Find below the key highlights forDesh Bhagat University admissions 2025:
Desh Bhagat UniversityHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode/ Online
Programmes offered
40+ (excluding specialisations)
Admission Status 2025
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG, PhD, Diploma
Popular programmes
BSc| MSc| MBA| BTech
Download brochure

Students are accepted into the programmes offered at Desh Bhagat University on both merit and entrance basis. The university offers a variety of specialisations for its courses. The university conducts its own entrance-cum scholarship test;DSBETfor certain programmes. Additionally, it also accepts national and state-level exams such as NEET, and CUET as well. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for the courses offered atDesh Bhagat University courses:

The admissions to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses are conducted on the basis of the merits scored in the last qualifying examination and the entrance exam conducted by the Desh Bhagat University i.e. DSBET. The university also accepts various national-level entrance exams for some of its courses. Interested students who fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the university need to follow the below-mentioned steps to complete theadmission process at Desh Bhagat University:
Step 1: Desh Bhagat University Application Process 2025

Interested candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website of Desh Bhagat University to fill out the application form online. The candidates need to select the desired course, pay the application fee and upload the specified documents to complete the registration. The candidates will have to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university.
Step 2: Desh Bhagat University Selection Process

Once the registration is done, the candidates will be shortlisted based on the marks obtained in the relevant entrance exams. For certain courses and specialisations, merit in the last qualifying exam is also taken into consideration.
Step 3: Desh Bhagat University Counselling and Fee Payment

The shortlisted candidates will then be called in for counselling based on which seats will be allotted. Once the seats have been allotted the students will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to complete the admission process.

placement_report.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Desh Bhagat University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: According to the official data available, the overall highest package offered during Desh Bhagat University placements in recent past stood at INR 2.36 Crore per Annum. Earlier, a total of 856 students were placed out of 2,234 students during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022. Further, the highest and average package offered during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022 stood at INR 8.00 LPA and INR 4.50 LPA , respectively. Apart from this, 52 campus recruitment process and 10 On and Off campus drives were held during Desh Bhagat University placements 2022. The top recruiters of Desh Bhagat University in 2022 included leading companies such as Infosys, IBM and PepsiCo. Other than this, according to Desh Bhagat University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Desh Bhagat University UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.4 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during Desh Bhagat University PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 3.8 LPA.

faqs.question: How strong is the Desh Bhagat University placements cell?
faqs.answer: Desh Bhagat University extends training and placement support to its students. The university has an established placement cell that looks after the on-campus placements. It plays a liaison role between the students and companies. Moreover, many placement-related activities are conducted at DBU. Following is a list of placement activities conducted at the university: Industrial Visits: These visits are essential as they help the students understand how industries work in real life. They get to understand the functioning of industries. Guest Lectures: The placement cell arranges Guest Lectures, where industry leaders come to guide students and tell them about prospective career paths. Personality Development Programme: In this programme, the university helps students develop employability skills such as communication, leadership, time management, industry-based skills, and more.

faqs.question: Which skills do I need to acquire while pursuing B.Pharm from Desh Bhagat University to get my dream job?
faqs.answer: BPharm at DBU helps students cultivate an understanding of various topics, such as Medicinal Chemistry, Human Anatomy, Drug Dosage, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Anatomy, Microbiology, and more. However, in today’s competitive world, in addition to theoretical knowledge, students must also pursue various skill-based courses to become industry-ready. Sills are the prerequisite abilities employers need before they hire a candidate. Listed below are the skills required to get a dream job in the Pharmaceutical sector: Drug therapy ability Knowledge of company policies Patient care Outstanding customer service Clinical reasoning Problem-solving skills Interpersonal skills Teamwork skills Empathy Basic care techniques and knowledge Urgent care and emergency care

faqs.question: Which are the top companies that take part of the placement drive at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab?
faqs.answer: The campus recruitment process consists of a written test, group discussion and personal interview.The top placement drives include the top brands according the market. They provide you with decent amount of salary and good experience. Some of these are : Tech Mahindra IDS Infotech Ltd. Web Apex Technologies IACT IBM Global Process Serviceso Tata Teleservices Ltd. Secugenius Security Solutions ShareKhan Ltd Yellow Pages Saber Papers Ltd Reliance HR Service Pvt Ltd India Infoline Ltd Keep hustling.

faqs.answer: The average annual package for B.Tech Civil Engineering students at Desh Bhagat University in Punjab ranges between Rs. 4,00,000 and Rs. 8,00,000. For more detail check the college website or shiksha website.

faqs.question: What is the fee for three years B.A course at Desh Bhagat University?
faqs.answer: The total fee to pursue a BA at DBU varies depending on the choice of specialisation. Thus, the fee ranges from INR 21,100 to INR 3,00,000 . Other than this, the fee structure includes other charges such as admission fees, hostel fees, and other charges. Candidates who wish to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university. Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per unofficial sources. Hence, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab expensive?
faqs.answer: Desh Bhagat University in Punjab offers an MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) programme that may be regarded as relatively expensive., the average cost of courses at the university is around INR 94,600 each year. Furthermore, the total costs for dental programs such as BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) at Desh Bhagat Dental College & Hospital amount to approximately INR 17.6 lakhs. When these values are compared to the normal range for MDS fees in India, which can range from INR 1,00,000 to INR 10,00,000 per year depending on the institution and specialization, pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University may be somewhat expensive.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at Desh Bhagat University, Punjab?
faqs.answer: Desh Bhagat University (DBU) in Punjab has different fees for different courses: BCA: INR 50,100 (1st year fee) B.Sc {Hons.}: INR 54,100 (1st year fee) BBA: INR 50,100 (1st year fee) B.Tech in Computer Engineering: INR 94,600 per year M.Com: INR 47,100 per year MBA: INR 1.15 Lacs (1st year fee) M.Tech: INR 84,600 (1st year fee) BAMS: INR 3,50,000 per year, and the full package with hostel is INR 17.5 lakh

faqs.question: How are Desh Bhagat University BCom placements?
faqs.answer: As per the overall placement statistics, a total of 856 students were placed out of 2,234 students during recent year placements. Moreover, the DBU Overall NIRF Report 2023 is available. As per that, the median package offered during UG 3-year placements in 2022 stood at INR 3.4 LPA . Other than this, some of the prominent recruiters that participated in the recent placements include Tech Mahindra, IBM, IACT, Web Appex, and more.
