description: Desh Bhagat University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Desh Bhagat University NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 781866 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Desh Bhagat University BDS cutoff 2025 was 781866 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1133451 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Desh Bhagat University accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Desh Bhagat University category-wise cutoff 2025, along with 2024 and 2023 are provided in the table below for different rounds and categories. For BDS admission, the last round cutoff rank was 970313 for the students belonging to the General home state quota. In 2024, the closing cutoff for the same course was 292356._x000D_

Desh Bhagat University cutoff 2024 was released throughout a few rounds for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff list was released based on the NEET PG rank, choice declared, availability of seats in college and course, and reservation factors. For MDS admission, the last round closing ranks varied between 6673 and 15423 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Of all the MDS specialisations, the most competitive was MDS in Conservative Dentistry.

hostel.description: Desh Bhagat University provides hostels accommodation for both boys and girls.All the hostels have basic amenities like water purifiers, common room, recreation room, mess, TV, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.
facilities: The students who complete one year and leave the programme will be awarded a Certificate in Commerce
The students who complete two years/four semesters and leave the programme will be awarded a Diploma in Commerce.
The students who successfully complete three years/six semesters and leave the programme will be awarded a BCom degree
An option is given to the students to continue their education to the Fourth year and those who successfully complete four years/eight semesters will be awarded a BCom (Hons) degree

library.description: The Library is air-conditioned and computerized with an integrated system connected to the Campus Network, providing Internet and e-mail facility to the academic environment / University community. The reference collection of the Library is continuously updated and augmented with the acquisition of CD-ROM databases and access to online databases on the Internet. Online Public Access Catalogue facility is available at the Reference Desk of the Library. OPAC can also be accessed through any terminal on the Campus Network. Library collection can also be searched through Web OPAC. Apart from this the university's Central Library has it's own WEB OPAC (Online Public Access Catalogue) for its Library Users so that they can comfortably access the library resources from anywhere and at any time.

reviews.review_heading: The college is actually good, with good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is great. It has Wi-Fi and a canteen. The mess food is good, and AC rooms are available too, with Wi-Fi, and cleaning is done properly. There is no power cut, and generators are available. It provides grounds and sports equipment.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were very good. Our labs, including biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology, were very well maintained, and the laboratory equipment was very well maintained. The canteen food quality was really appreciated, and the game facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of Desh Bhagat University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and facilities are cooperative, they always help us. There are hostel facilities provided at a reasonable cost. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university and hostel. Classrooms have projectors, and labs are conducted every day. There is a huge library as well.

reviews.review_heading: It's written that this is a university, but I don't think so because there is not much crowd in BDS.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi available, and the labs are not well developed. The classrooms are good, but the library is not good. There are no collections of books. Hostels are good, but the mess food is not good as it is so hard and there is a fluctuation of menu. Sports facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostels is superb as there are so many buildings in good condition with well-maintained washrooms. The college campus has several gardens. It has different types of labs and a library also. The hostel also has a ground for playing and sitting. Mess food is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college because of faculty, placement rate, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: We got all the facilities available in our university. First of all, I will talk about infrastructure. The infrastructure of our university is the best. Facilities in our hostel include Wi-Fi, water that is filtered, and attached washrooms. Geysers are also installed. We have all the stationary items available in our university. Bus service is also available, and one thing I want to add is that the campus is ragging-free.

reviews.review_heading: This college is awesome for this course.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is so nice as every building is well maintained.Gardens and parks are also here. Bathrooms are cleaned time to time. Library and various labs are also present. Hostel buildings are also good. Mess food is made with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good. It gives a very good campus life as everybody is so nice and friendly.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is awesome as the buildings are in good condition. The campus is very beautiful as gardens and parks are present here. Bathrooms are in good condition and are cleaned time to time. It has a big library and labs are also present. Hostel apartments are also in well-maintained condition. Mess food is also quite good and is made with proper hygiene. Sports facilities are also present with several game equipment.

reviews.review_heading: And the college campus and University are the best of in the university fees structureplacement
reviews.review_text: The faculties are available and the infrastructure all are very good and also wifi available in all universities campus and hostel facilities and class room and library room is also there. The quality of all hostel rooms and wifi facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure with all facilities and qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the Wi-Fi connection is good in the ground and corridors. They provide all facilities, including good labs and resources, and have wonderful classrooms with advanced screening boards. The college offers all medical facilities and provides classes for games, along with tasty canteen food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is nice with friendly environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very beautiful here. We have a beautiful garden and campus area for enjoyment and a study canteen is also available in our college, where we get food items at very affordable prices. Staff are very friendly and helpful in nature. Buildings are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Desh Bhagat University review.
reviews.review_text: The department has classrooms, labs, a library, and wifi. The campus is well-maintained, with lots of trees and plants. There's a well-maintained herbarium with a gardener on staff. The hostel has wifi, indoor and outdoor games, a walking ramp, a gymnasium, and a good mess with snacks and sweets.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best or top universities in Punjab. Desh Bhagat University is NAAC A+.
reviews.review_text: The university provides campus free Wi-Fi with high speed, specialized labs for each department such as computer labs for IT and CS departments. Smart classrooms with projectors, modern seating arrangements, and air conditioning are available. Libraries have vast collections of books, journals, and e-books. Hostels provide well-furnished rooms with beds, study tables, storage space, and AC or cooler available. Mess facilities serve breakfast, lunch, dinner, and evening snacks. The menu is balanc...

reviews.review_heading: The best college for civil engineering is Desh Bhagat University.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure is available in my course department. Classrooms and the campus have Wi-Fi facilities. Students can access the Wi-Fi network after some processes that the Desh Bhagat University IT department can assist with. Hostel facilities are okay. When I was in my 1st year, fewer facilities were provided in the hostel, but this year there has been noticeable improvement in the hostel rooms. The mess is also okay; the food is acceptable, hygienic, but the quality is dull.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best private universities in Punjab at a low fee. Thank you, DBU.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include unlimited Wi-Fi, laboratories, and AC classrooms with 24-hour electricity available in each department. Each department has its own library with many academic and journal books. Hygienic and healthy food is provided in the hostel. Wi-Fi, water coolers, 24-hour electricity, ACs, and coolers are also available in each hostel. There are 7 blocks for boys' hostels and 3 blocks for girls', which are separate from the boys' hostel. Sports activities like cricket, running, and vo...

college_info.college_name: Desh Bhagat University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Desh Bhagat University in Punjab offers an MDS (Master of Dental Surgery) programme that may be regarded as relatively expensive., the average cost of courses at the university is around INR 94,600 each year. Furthermore, the total costs for dental programs such as BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) at Desh Bhagat Dental College & Hospital amount to approximately INR 17.6 lakhs. When these values are compared to the normal range for MDS fees in India, which can range from INR 1,00,000 to INR 10,00,000 per year depending on the institution and specialization, pursuing MDS at Desh Bhagat University may be somewhat expensive.
Desh Bhagat University (DBU) in Punjab has different fees for different courses:
BCA: INR 50,100 (1st year fee)
B.Sc {Hons.}: INR 54,100 (1st year fee)
BBA: INR 50,100 (1st year fee)
B.Tech in Computer Engineering: INR 94,600 per year
M.Com: INR 47,100 per year
MBA: INR 1.15 Lacs (1st year fee)
M.Tech: INR 84,600 (1st year fee)
BAMS: INR 3,50,000 per year, and the full package with hostel is INR 17.5 lakh
Desh Bhagat University offers various government and its own scholarships. Students can check out some of the scholarships offered at DBU listed below:

The total fee to pursue a BA at DBU varies depending on the choice of specialisation. Thus, the fee ranges from INR 21,100 to INR 3,00,000. Other than this, the fee structure includes other charges such as admission fees, hostel fees, and other charges. Candidates who wish to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per unofficial sources. Hence, it is indicative and subject to change.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Jeppiaar Engineering College offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Jeppiaar Engineering College offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Jeppiaar Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Jeppiaar Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.question: Is Jeppiaar Engineering College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Jeppiaar Engineering College are B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Jeppiaar Engineering College has a rating of 3.6 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.6, 3.4, 3.8 and 3.5 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Jeppiaar Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college tries to improve its well-structured campus architecture and student development.

content.Placements: I am willing to give no stars because other colleges provide placements from the third year or the last semester onwards. In my college, only one or two companies come for campus drives. They are small companies that visit in the final year, during the seventh semester.
content.Infrastructure: My department is the worst in terms of maintaining the building, classrooms, and staff, as the staff is not well suited. The college is only now trying to improve the appearance of the campus. The hostel is also very poor, including the food, bathrooms, and rooms. It is not worth the money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with my college experience of this 2 years.

content.Placements: Above 65% of students got placed from information technology course during the year 2024-2025. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA-4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are ZOHO, TCL, Wipro, and Accenture. Above 75% of students got internships from information technology course in Corizo, Cognizant, and Novitech.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with neat classrooms and labs. In the IT department, the WI-FI is only in the staff room and the password will be shared with the students when the students' tasks from the staff. The quality of the hostel is above average, and the food is average. This college places give importance on sports and there are 2 grounds in the college. One is near the university and the other is near hostel. Medical facilities are very poor in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the worst management ever.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities at this college are average, with a clear bias towards CSE and IT degrees. If you're pursuing any other degree here, you might find it difficult to secure placement opportunities. Therefore, if you're considering a different field of study, this college may not be the ideal choice for you.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel management is very poor, lacking in maintenance and amenities, and the food here is very bad; they don't even care about food problems; many students skip morning meals; water is also a major problem; and amenities like haircuts and dress washing, which were just recently added, aren't even open all the time. Overall, the hostel in this college is the worst; you can rent a room outside, and the hostel feels like it costs 50,000 per year.

The entire college campus has a Wi-Fi facility with high-speed connectivity. College classrooms were furnished. The college has hostel facilities for the students. The food was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are very good.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is the best thing about our college life. Each room has beds, two large-size shelves and two large-size bathrooms with attached western toilets and washbasins. A more spacious one with a huge balcony, RO facilities and our hostel food would be the best. Each day, they have a special menu, except Friday. We will have non-vegetarian food every day. Their chicken gravy, fried rice, and mangoes are top-notch. The hostels will be within walkable distance from the college only; inside the c...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Jeppiaar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in the labs were too good because the environment in the labs and Wi-Fi facility in all systems and classrooms had projector mode for the students to easily understand the topics and every week there was one or two days for the library.

reviews.review_heading: My review is about the college atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and laboratory are available in campus and they have sufficient staff members to educated the students. The hostels are very neat and tidy. It can withhold a total of 100 students and meals are put thrice in a day. Evening snacks are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't provide Wi-Fi. Our labs and mess are average. Our college provides food two times a day for day scholars. The library of our college has a lot of books. Our college has a digital library. The hostel is average. Some labs are not working. Hostels are average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jeppiaar engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good, but the hostel maintenance is not very good. The library is great. The labs have all the equipment required, and it will all work. The sports are good, and they have some more records as well. The hostel room has two attached bathrooms, but it will not be cleaned by them.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jeppiaar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Fans are available in classrooms. Air-conditioners are available in some labs. The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food is not good. Hostel students get non-vegetarian meals three times a day, while day scholars get non-vegetarian meals two times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jeppiaar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The hostel fee is Rs. 50,000 per year. We have a canteen in the hostel. The hostel staff cleans every room twice a week. All rooms are well-maintained. The food served in our college is not good compared to other colleges. The food charges are expensive.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Several books were available in the library. The infrastructure was good. Laboratories were well-equipped. Classrooms were well-maintained. The food served in the mess was better. Non-vegetarian food items were offered 6 days a week for both day scholars and hostellers.

faqs.question: Q: What is the schedule for COMEDK Counselling 2025?

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BTech course through COMEDK 2024 scores must follow the below-mentioned steps to register for COMEDK Counselling 2024: Step 1: Visit the official website of COMEDK at comedk.org. Step 2: Login to Applicant Login ID using the application number and password.Step 3: On the next page, click on the 'Counselling Registration' TabStep 4: Verify the mentioned details and pay the registration fee to participate in COMEDK Counselling 2023Step 5: On the successful payment message, close the tab and go back to your application form.Step 6: Click on the ‘Document Upload' Tab and upload all the required documents. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has knowledgeable and student-friendly faculty members.

content.Placements: The drawback of this college is that it won't conduct programs like hackathons, etc. It is not very developed, which is the major reason for the smaller number of placements. 70 percent of students got placed from the CSE department with a package of 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course is excellent, but the hostel facility is not good. The food provided in the hostel is not so good, and students staying in the hostel are not satisfied with it. Except for food, other things are well-maintained. Students' safety is secure here, and only on weekends they are allowed to go out of the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is not good and I don't recommend you people to join this.

content.Placements: Placements are not at all good. It is way more complicated and does not help students to get placed. The highest package ranges from 7 LPA - 8 LPA. The lowest salary is 2 LPA. It is not good for students. It is way more complicated and not useful for all the students and not very helpful.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good and they are strict in their own way. They make more money from it and library is a good thing to happen in our college. It's good to be part of the library and is useful to us. It is way more bigger and has almost all kinds of books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: An review about MIT Mysore.

content.Placements: The college placements are not good. They say we have good placements in our college. But the placements are less. About 60-70% of students will be placed every year says the students of the college. The average package ranges from 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Till now, the highest package is 18 LPA. Overall, placements are not good.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average but they will provide good air-ventilated rooms with the best light quality and a good water supply. The hostel is good and Wi-Fi does not work properly. But the food is okay. Non-veg is not available in the hostel and also not allowed in the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements are less, but really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Currently, placements in our college are average. Our college has recently become autonomous, so we can expect good placements. I am passing out in the year 2028. Currently, only 20% of students get placed in our college, but expected to improve in 2028.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Labs are large but only limited systems for students to use. It has an old version. Hostels are average. Our college has a canteen with good food and accessories available with hygiene.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: I'm currently in my first year of studies but my sister was placed in this college with a salary of 6 LPA at Bosch. To be honest, the placement rate at my college is average and not everyone gets placed. They look for talent. As far as I know, approximately 40 students were placed last year, with the highest package being 9 LPA. Top companies like Bosch and Infosys have visited our college multiple times.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are good but we don’t have any Wi-Fi. Classrooms are nice. The library is the best in our college. It consists of four floors with almost every kind of book available and some journals recommend books for us. The canteen is average, but we have many options for snacks. The sports facilities are excellent, and games are played regularly.

description: Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 24015 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 24015 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 14792, while in 2023, it was 16503.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) has the lowest cutoff rank of 41831 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 39960, in the General All India quota.

According to the Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) stood at 98718 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.
Students can use the filters provided below to view the cutoff for other categories and quotas for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharaja Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has knowledgeable and student-friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the course is excellent, but the hostel facility is not good. The food provided in the hostel is not so good, and students staying in the hostel are not satisfied with it. Except for food, other things are well-maintained. Students' safety is secure here, and only on weekends they are allowed to go out of the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: College is not good and I don't recommend you people to join this.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and they are strict in their own way. They make more money from it and library is a good thing to happen in our college. It's good to be part of the library and is useful to us. It is way more bigger and has almost all kinds of books.

reviews.review_heading: An review about MIT Mysore.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average but they will provide good air-ventilated rooms with the best light quality and a good water supply. The hostel is good and Wi-Fi does not work properly. But the food is okay. Non-veg is not available in the hostel and also not allowed in the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are less, but really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. Labs are large but only limited systems for students to use. It has an old version. Hostels are average. Our college has a canteen with good food and accessories available with hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good but we don’t have any Wi-Fi. Classrooms are nice. The library is the best in our college. It consists of four floors with almost every kind of book available and some journals recommend books for us. The canteen is average, but we have many options for snacks. The sports facilities are excellent, and games are played regularly.

reviews.review_heading: This college has the worst campus placement.
reviews.review_text: They provide bus facilities for long range, infrastructure is good. College has a separate building for 1st year and department. There is no Wi-Fi facility, classrooms are good, and library is nice. Hostel management is not good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for passionate students.
reviews.review_text: The college provides disciplined classrooms and projectors for some of the classes. The labs are neatly maintained and have the best equipment. The Library here is the most attractive and well-built infrastructure. The college has a separate building for the library and has a cyberzone, studying area, and book banks. The hostel has good infrastructure, and the rooms are well built, which can be occupied by 3 students. The mess food here is average. The hostel management conducts DJ nights, sport...

reviews.review_heading: Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the hostel because I'm a day scholar. I know they provide good food, snacks, and hot water facilities. Also, they don't allow us into the hostel without a reason. There are timings for hot water. Yes, there is also a mess canteen for food, which is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review on MIT. It is best for the students who just focus on studies.
reviews.review_text: There is a library which is spacious with internet facilities for peaceful study and a normal area for students and a playground for sports. ATM and stationary facilities are provided inside the campus. Free transportation is provided by the college to every student.

reviews.review_heading: It's absolutely a school rather than a college.
reviews.review_text: Good labs, good faculty members, nice way of teaching, all kinds of co-curricular activities are done, and all kinds of fests and hackathons were conducted, which helps students improve their confidence. By doing all these activities, the department has been pushing students towards their goals.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are too horrible and needs to be improved.
reviews.review_text: This year, they have introduced many CSE-allied branches despite having shortages in classrooms and faculty. So the students are facing huge trouble and the classrooms are now being built. There are just concentrations to increase intake, not the faculty and infrastructure .

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and no good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi facilities. Inside the classroom, we should not use mobile phones. The library infrastructure is good; we can access the books for free, and the time period is for a month. Later, we have to make a renewal. Hostel facility means rooms are good, but food is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: MAHARAJA INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY REVIEW.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and the buildings are huge. The tables are a bit old. The library is excellent and one of the best places. The canteen is also good with reasonable prices for good food, and there is a stationary shop also present which charges very less price for all items present there.

reviews.review_heading: My reviews on MIT College.
reviews.review_text: Teachers are very good and knowledgeable, who have high teaching skills. They can only be placed in the placement of our college. Semester exams are easy and good to get high marks in the exams. The course curriculum is relevant for our subject and nice to learn.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, it is better to join our college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are better; some subjects have good teaching facilities, while others are even better. The quality of facilities in our hostel is better, but not excellent, and the food quality is better. However, there is no medical facility.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG level, Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology, Guna offers full-time BTech, BSc, BBA, and other programmes. At the PG level, the institute offers MTech, MBA, MSc, MCA, and other programmes. Additionally, Jaypee University Guna offers a PhD programme through its various departments. Here is the list of schools at Jaypee University:

faqs.answer: A:    All the courses in the University will be run on self-finance mode. The following types of fees may be charged from the students; (a) Caution Money - Once in the whole Study (Refundable) (b) Prospectus/ Registration form fee - On purchase (c) Tuition fee - Semester wise (d) Hostel Charges - Semester wise (e) Development Fee - Semester wise (f) Admission Charge - Once (Non Refundable)Programmes Tuition Fee for M techPer Semester (Rs.) Development Fee,47940Per Semester (Rs.) Caution Money,8460Once - Refundable (Rs.),5000Admission Charge,15000Once-Non Refundable (Rs.)Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology (JUET), Guna is ranked 86 among the top 100 universities in India by NIRF ranking and ranked 61 among top universities in India by Edurand ranking. The institute is awarded ‘Best Private Engineering University’ in Madhya Pradesh by Edurand ranking. JUET Guna offers degree and doctoral courses in the discipline of Engineering, Mathematical Sciences, Science, etc.
faqs.question: What are the fees structures for M.Tech programmes at Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to pay an application fee to apply for a course. Aspirants can pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Below is course-wise application fee:CourseApplication FeeBTechINR 1,200DiplomaINR 200MScINR 500MTech/ PhDINR 1,000
faqs.question: What is the application fee for JUET?

faqs.answer: A:    Jaypee University of Engineering Technology Guna considers national or state-level entrance exams for admission. The university accepts JEE Main for BTech and GATE/ CUET-PG/ JUET PGCET for M.Tech programmes. Aspirants applying for PhD course need to qualify one of the accepted entrance exams. The university accepts NET/ SLET/ GATE/ PhD Entrance Test for PhD admission.
faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted at JUET Guna?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses at Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Guna. The minimum aggregate required for UG programmes is 60%. Hence, aspirants with 70% in Class 12 are eligible to apply for preferred UG programmes. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates.

review_content.Placements: Placement is good, not excellent. Most of the companies are mass recruiters and do not offer high packages. The highest package for 2025: is 24 LPA. For CSE, placement percentage can vary from 90% to 95%, with different roles offered including SDE, sales, marketing, etc. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is 5- 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. The condition of buildings and hostels is top-notch. You will find a lush green campus with a 24/7 water and electricity supply. College hostels are also good, featuring nicely ventilated rooms with a centralized cooling system operated by college management. Labs and classrooms are modern, equipped with modern systems and smart board facilities.

review_content.Infrastructure: The college is well-built with good infrastructure. Each lecture theatre is air-conditioned. Classrooms are also connected to ducts. The college has a very spacious library with lots of books in various fields, and the library is also air-conditioned.

review_summary.college_name: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I have mixed review of my college.

content.Placements: Last year, around 80% of the students got placed. Companies recruited for all domains for various positions for freshers, with the highest placement being offered at around 24 LPA, and the lowest placement offered was around 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: My overall college campus is quite scenic with a lake inside it. Jaypee University Guna offers a lush green campus. The hostels are average, and the mess food is very bad, as I personally don't like its taste. The medical facilities are very basic if you have something like ever or could.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Do not take admission here, it is absolutely not worth your money.

content.Placements: Originally, only 60% of the students get placed, of which 40% is from off-campus. All new startups come here for hiring, as no big MNCs come. The companies they put on the website are fake, those are all India-level openings. Software Developer is the role that is offered. The lowest package is 4 LPA, the highest from on-campus is 20 LPA, and 7 LPA is the average. Only 2% of students get internship opportunities from the college. Everyone either gets an internship from a fake provider who takes money for a certificate, or they get it from off-campus, as there are no other internship opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement is good, not excellent. Most of the companies are mass recruiters and do not offer high packages. The highest package for 2025: is 24 LPA. For CSE, placement percentage can vary from 90% to 95%, with different roles offered including SDE, sales, marketing, etc. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is 5- 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. The condition of buildings and hostels is top-notch. You will find a lush green campus with a 24/7 water and electricity supply. College hostels are also good, featuring nicely ventilated rooms with a centralized cooling system operated by college management. Labs and classrooms are modern, equipped with modern systems and smart board facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in terms of studies.

content.Placements: The placement scenario in this college is good. They offer good placement. The highest package is 44 LPA, the average is 7 LPA, and the median is 3 LPA. The top companies are Mahindra, Wipro, and many more. More than 90% of students get placed, and many get internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college is well-built with good infrastructure. Each lecture theatre is air-conditioned. Classrooms are also connected to ducts. The college has a very spacious library with lots of books in various fields, and the library is also air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college infrastructure is really good, and all facilities are there. Placements are also good

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is high, with at least 300 out of 320 students placed. The lowest package is 8 LPA and the highest is 44 LPA. Companies are Google, Apple, Amazon, Meta, and others recruit students. Around 70 to 90% of students get internships with companies like Wipro, TCS, and Capgemini. The roles are software engineer, backend developer, frontend developer, and AI engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi in the hostel is not even good, but it works properly in classrooms. Labs are too good, neat, and clean. Classrooms are good and big. The library has all types of books, and you can issue them as well. All books quality is too good like a new one.

admission_overview.college_name: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Fee & Application

admission_process.title: JUET Guna Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JUET Guna admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, GATE, etc. for admission to specific courses.Jaypee University of Engineering & Technologyoffers UG, PG and doctoral courses including BTech, MTech, BSc, MSc, and PhD. Interested candidates can apply forJUET Guna admissionsvia online or offline mode.

Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology admission cycle usually opens inFebruary. The university conducts an entrance exam for PhD aspirants. For all other courses, a national-level entrance exam or merit is the only criterion for admission. Below are keyJUET Guna admissionhighlights:
Particulars
JUET Guna Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
UG courses:INR 5.5 lakh - INR 8.1 lakh
PG courses:INR 88,900 - INR 2.2 lakh
How to apply?
https://www.juet.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

For admission to any of the JUET Guna courses, candidates are required to meet both eligibility and selection requirements. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for any of the PG programmes. Find below popularJUET Guna coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Check out more details in the below video:

The total fee of JUET includes various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Candidates have to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is theJUET Guna feeand average package for popular courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates are offered seats in JUET Guna based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants have to confirm their seat at the time of admission by paying a course fee. Below is the course-wise seat intake for JUET:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology admission process includes multiple steps such as registration, selection and admission confirmation. The registrations are usually open inFebruaryevery year. Candidates are required to apply for their preferred course within the deadline. Below are the steps to get a seat in JUET Guna:
STEP 1: JUET Guna Application Process 2025

JUET applications open online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply with an application fee. The registration fee for BTech is INR 1,200 whereas, candidates applying for MTech/ PhD have to pay an application fee of INR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the candidates have applied for the course of their choice, they need to wait for the selection list. The university shortlists candidates for popular courses like BTech and MTech based on entrance exam scores. JUET accepts JEE Main or considers the Class 12 merit for BTech admission. The selection for MTech is based on GATE, CUET-PG or PGCET scores. For MSc, the merit of the candidate in the qualifying exam is considered for admission.
STEP 3: Counselling & Admission Confirmation

Selected candidates have to attend offline counselling. Aspirants must bring the specified documents for verification. The university releases the admission offer for the selected aspirants. Such candidates are then required to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: JUET Guna BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineering,Civil Engineering,Chemical Engineering, etc. Besides, the university also offers lateral entry to BTech courses. Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for the BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at JUET?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to complete Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one subject out of Chemistry, Computer Science, Electronics, Information Technology, Informatics Practices, Technical Vocational Subject, Agriculture, Engineering Graphics, Business Studies, Entrepreneurship and English with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for JUET BTech. Aspirants appearing for the Class 12 exam can also apply.

faqs.question: Is BTech available at JUET?
faqs.answer: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Guna offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech inComputer Science Engineering,Civil Engineering,Chemical Engineering, etc. Additionally, the university also offers lateral entry to BTech courses. Aspirants who have passed Class 12 with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at JUET?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology BTech ranges betweenINR 5.5 Lacs and INR 8.1 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Below are other components of JUET fee:Fee ComponentFeeOne-time feeINR 45,000Hostel feeINR 1.26 lakh - INR 6.40 lakh

courses_data.name: JUET Guna MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology offers two-year MTech course spread across four semesters. MTech is offered inChemical Engineering, Civil, Computer Science and Engineering, etc. Candidates need to complete BE/ BTech degree with at least 60% aggregate or 6.0 CGPA on 10 point scale in the relevant discipline. can apply for MTech. The selection for MTech will be based on entrance exams such as GATE, CUET-PG, etc.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in M.Tech at JUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates with a valid GATE or any other national-level entrance exam score can get direct admission to M.Tech programme. The university also accepts CUET-PG score for MTech. Aspirants appearing in the final year examination of the qualifying degree may also apply. They will be required to submit mark sheet of the qualifying degree on or before the date of registration.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for M.Tech at JUET?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology M.Tech isINR 2.2 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Below are other components of JUET fee:Fee ComponentFeeOne-time feeINR 20,000Hostel feeINR 3.20 lakh

faqs.question: Does JUET conducts entrance exam for M.Tech admission?
faqs.answer: JUET conducts an entrance exam for M.Tech admission. JUET Guna PGET is the abbreviated form of the Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Post Graduate Entrance Test. It is conducted to admit Non-GATE qualified candidates to M.Tech programmes offered by the university. Besides, GATE-qualified candidates must not appear in JUET Guna PGET. The seats that are left vacant after the admission of GATE-qualified candidates are offered to the Non-GATE qualified candidates through PGET.

courses_data.name: JUET Guna MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: JUET Guna offers a two-year MSc programme divided into four semesters. The university offers an MSc in specialisations such asMathematics,Physicsand Chemistry. Candidates who have completed BSc with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST) are eligible to apply for MSc programme. The selection to BSc programme is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: Which are the MSc specialisations offered at JUET Guna?
faqs.answer: JUET Guna offers a two-year MSc programme divided into four semesters. Candidates need to pass a minimum of graduation to apply for any of the below-mentioned MSc specialisations:PhysicsChemistryMathematics

faqs.question: How much is the MSc fee at JUET Guna?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for JUET Guna MSc programme isINR 88,900.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Besides, aspirants also have to pay INR 5,000 as caution deposit and INR 3.20 Lacs as hostel fee. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MSc at JUET Guna?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass BSc with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for MSc at JUET Guna. The selection to the course is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Can I apply at JUET Guna with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for UG courses at Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology Guna. The minimum aggregate required for UG programmes is 60%. Hence, aspirants with 70% in Class 12 are eligible to apply for preferred UG programmes. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for JUET Guna?
faqs.answer: Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria to apply for admission at JUET. Aspirants must hold the document sproving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Find below JUET Guna eligibility criteria for popular courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one subject out of Chemistry, Computer Science, Electronics, Information Technology, Informatics Practices, Technical Vocational Subject, Agriculture, Engineering Graphics, Business Studies, Entrepreneurship and English with at least 60% aggregate (55% aggregate for SC/ ST)MTechBE/ BTech with at least 60% aggregate or 6.0 CGPA on 10 point scale in the relevant disciplineMScBSc with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST)PhDPG degree with at least 55% aggregate (50% aggregate for SC/ ST)

faqs.question: How can I get admission in JUET?
faqs.answer: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology admissions are primarily based on entrance exam. The university shortlists candidates for admission to courses such as BTech and MTech based on entrance exam scores. JUET accepts JEE Main for BTech admission. The selection for MTech is based on GATE, CUET-PG or PGCET scores.

faqs.question: What is the last date for Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology admission is currently open. The university has not released admission deadline yet. However, aspirants must apply as soon as possible to avoid missing out the chance. Admission to UG and PG courses is both merit and entrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as GATE, Karnataka PGCET, etc. for admission to specific programmes.

reviews.review_heading: I have mixed review of my college.
reviews.review_text: My overall college campus is quite scenic with a lake inside it. Jaypee University Guna offers a lush green campus. The hostels are average, and the mess food is very bad, as I personally don't like its taste. The medical facilities are very basic if you have something like ever or could.

reviews.review_heading: Do not take admission here, it is absolutely not worth your money.
reviews.review_text: All the private universities have good infrastructure, and nowadays, they only run to make a profit and don't even care about students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The condition of buildings and hostels is top-notch. You will find a lush green campus with a 24/7 water and electricity supply. College hostels are also good, featuring nicely ventilated rooms with a centralized cooling system operated by college management. Labs and classrooms are modern, equipped with modern systems and smart board facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good in terms of studies.
reviews.review_text: The college is well-built with good infrastructure. Each lecture theatre is air-conditioned. Classrooms are also connected to ducts. The college has a very spacious library with lots of books in various fields, and the library is also air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: My college infrastructure is really good, and all facilities are there. Placements are also good
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi in the hostel is not even good, but it works properly in classrooms. Labs are too good, neat, and clean. Classrooms are good and big. The library has all types of books, and you can issue them as well. All books quality is too good like a new one.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements with high packages, but internship data is limited.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is poor in the hostel while their library is good. Medical facilities are not so good. The mess is absolutely a mess. The university provides well-equipped classrooms and state-of-the-art laboratories tailored to various engineering disciplines, ensuring a conducive learning environment. There is a library named Learning Resource Center. It is located in the academic block. The library spans three levels and accommodates 295 users. It boasts a rich collection of books, journals, research r...

reviews.review_heading: JUET is a good college but not worth the money.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi here is below average. There is a computer lab, physics lab, electrical science lab, engineering drawing lab, language lab, mechanical lab, and civil lab in good condition. Classrooms have the capacity of more than 120 students. Hostel quality is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are really good with air-conditioned classrooms and library. Ducts are provided in every hostel room. College provides 3 GB of data to each student every day. There is also a hall named as Tagore hall for all the events to be conducted with over 2,000 people capacity.

reviews.review_heading: Has very few placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided here are average. On a scale of 10, it would be 6.5. There is a Wi-Fi facility available 24/7 but has a limit; it is not unlimited. Labs are properly functional by the faculty members and the staff. Proper discipline is maintained in the labs, and good-quality computers are used in labs. Classrooms are average and can occupy 120 students at once at max. We do not have smart classrooms. The library here is the worst library, as it has a time till 10 pm only; no one is allo...

reviews.review_heading: A decent college, good faculty, and average placement.
reviews.review_text:
Most of the faculty members have done PhDs. In their respective subjects, they teach well, and the classroom and labs are good. 
Hostels are best. You will have 2 options one in which you can take your personal room or 3-sharing room but one thing is good: in the 3-sharing room, there is a small wall to maintain a little bit of privacy. Food was okay. 
Medical facilities are provided. Sports grounds are there: cricket, football, volleyball, badminton, table tennis and a lot of games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good and decent .
reviews.review_text: All classrooms here are well built, spacious, and air conditioned. Here we also have a two-floor library with great speed Wi-Fi, and it is also air conditioned. Here, hostels are also good for all students, and the food is also good, and we have multiple grounds for sports here.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: I have opted for the hostel and mess facilities of my college. Here, hostels are air-cooled and there is plenty of space in each hostel room for three students. The mess food is very good. Chefs in my mess are trained and each of them has a hotel management degree.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very calm, green, and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, library, cafeteria, and labs. The library is available for students until midnight. In the hostels, separate rooms are available. The canteen food is fine, and the mess food is okay. Medical facilities are open 24/7. Sports of mostly all kinds are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good campus and a lush green campus.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good but the mess food is not good and the food is same for whole week. Infrastructure of college is good the university is 122 acre.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is below average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. There is overall greenery in this college, and the institute invests a lot in this college for maintaining the development of the college. Though they take extra money as development fees from the students but invest in the college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jaypee University of Engineering and Technology

likes.text: Companies like Amazon, Infosys, Cognizant, Ola Cab, TCS, Wipro and many others visited our college in past years.
The well functioning Training and Placement cell of the college equips the students here for securing the best of internships in leading IT Industries.

likes.text: We have a wonderful campus, not just lots of greenery but well built hostels, Annapurna (mess) and of course a well built and well-equipped Academic Section.
The hotel rooms, mess and cafeteria, are hygienic and serves good quality of food.

likes.text: Talking about academics, the faculty members are very helpful, especially in CSE branch which are participated in by students with great Enthusiasm.
The course curriculum is nice as it covers all the topics which are important to increase our knowledge so we can become eligible for placements.

admission_process.title: Vikram University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Students are offered an extensive range of courses across various specialisations at Vikram University. The admission and application process of the university commences online. The university provides these courses through its various Schools. Students can check out the following table to know about the key highlights for Vikram University's admission: To get admission to Vikram University, candidates must follow the admission procedure as per the University's admission guidelines. Candidates applying must ensure to satisfy the course-specific admission criteria. The university accepts applications online. Find below theVikram University admission process:
Step 1: Vikram University Registration Process

Vikram University registration usually commences in July.Non-CUET courses will be conducted based on the last qualifying exam. Candidates must register via Vikram University's official website.Candidates who wish to take the CUET exam should fill out the application form online when it becomes available. Interested applicants were able to apply online on the official websites of CUET UG and CUET PG. For BTech and MTech, registration is done via DTE Bhopal.
Step 2: Appear for the CUET exam

Candidates who have registered for CUET are required to appear for the exam in the subject of their choice and get a valid score. Common University Entrance Test also known asCUET UG and CUET PGis a national-level entrance exam conducted in online mode.
Step 3: Selection Process

The selection of candidates is done based on their merit and in accordance with the CUET cutoffs. For the non-CUET candidates, shortlisting is done based on their scores in the last qualifying examination. This ensures fairness and transparency in the selection process.
Step 4: Admission List

The University releases the admission list in four quarters. The admission is the final list with the names of candidates who have secured a seat in the University. The admission list is prepared based on the completion of the eligibility as per the university admission guidelines.
Step 5: Fee payment

Once the admission list is out, candidates are required to pay the admission fee on or before the fee payment date. After paying the fee, candidates must submit their self-attested documents for verification.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Vikram University?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is an entrance exam for some courses at Vikram University. Admission to some of the courses at Vikram University is made through an entrance test conducted by the university. However, admission to all the programmes is merit-based except for a very few programmes which are based on the entrance exam. The university accepts admission on the basis of CUET entrance test. The university also accepts JEE Main for its BTech programme. The eligibility for some courses is a score of a minimum of 65% in class 12th with Science and math.

faqs.question: When will CMAT 2024 be conducted?
faqs.answer: The National Testing Agency (NTA) offers the Common Management Admission Test (CMAT), a business aptitude exam, to help with admission to MBA and PGDM programmes. Approximately 1,300 private and public B-schools in India, including Great Lakes Institute of Management, JBIMS, SIMSREE, K J Somaiya Mumbai, Welingkar Mumbai, and PUMBA, have acknowledged it. The CMAT 2024 is likely to be scheduled around April or May of 2024. The CMAT 2024 exam date is anticipated to be revealed by NTA around the last week of January 2024, with registration opening in February of the same year. A wide variety of private and public colleges accept the CMAT because it is a moderately demanding exam.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Vikram University for MBA?
faqs.answer: To apply for the MBA at Vikram University, candidates must first check the eligibility criteria as per theDirectorate of Technical Education (DTE), Madhya Pradesh admission association. Eligible candidates must further appear for the entrance exam followed by the counselling process. Candidates must complete Vikram University's application process, pay the application fee, and finalise their seats. Find below details of MBA admission:Eligiblity Criteria:Bachelor's degree with 40% aggregate from any recognised institution.Entracne Exam:Register for theCommon Management Admission Test (CMAT) exam 2024.Counselling:Participate in the MBA counselling conduted under DTE.Admission List:The University releases 'Admission List' with candidate's name who are shortlisted based on the eligibility and entrance exam/counselling.Seat Finalisation:Candiates can pay the admission fee to block their seats in the University. Candidates are required to submit attested documents for verification.

faqs.question: Which skills do I need to acquire while pursuing a MBA course from Vikram University to get my dream job?
faqs.answer: MBA is one of the top preferred PG courses in India. Because of this, MBA graduates also face a lot of competition in the corporate world. With such increasing competition among job seekers, having only theoretical knowledge might not be enough to thrive in the corporate landscape. MBA students must develop important employability skills such as leadership, good communication skills, adaptability, time management, etc. These skills would help students get better-paying jobs that align with their interests. Moreover, students can also develop specific industry-based skills that align with their interests. Listed below are some of the skills demanded in today’s corporate world: Industry Based Skills Digital Marketing HR Analytics Financial Modelling Foreign Language Consumer Analytics Employability Skills Problem-solving Critical Thinking Team work Time management

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBA students at Vikram University?
faqs.answer: At Vikram University, the typical pay package ranges from 2.5 LPA to 4.5 LPA. The offered salary packages range from 2 LPA at the lowest to 15 LPA at the top. The average package at Vikram University is INR 3.5 LPA. Among the leading recruiters participating in the Vikram University Ujjain placements are Byjus, TCS, L&T, BPCL, ICICI, HDFC, Wipro, etc.

The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Vikram University JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Vikram University cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 303157 and 921008 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 303157, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 171287.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 303157.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ITM Skills University offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses to students. The courses are offered across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Design and Media, Health Science, and others. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BBA, Bachelor of UX Design, BA-IHTM, BA in Culinary Arts and others. At the PG level, the university offers MBA, Master of Optometry, and others. ITM Skills University also offers an Executive MBA programme in Financial Services, e-Commerce & Digital Marketing, and Business Analytics. Below are ITM Skills University courses and :

faqs.answer: A:    The fee structure of for the BTech programme is INR 16 Lacs for four years. Students will be provided with a laptop, causal uniform, exclusive conferences and meetup passes this all included in the fee. Aspirants are required to pay for the course after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm the seat. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will be cancelled.
faqs.question: What is the fee structure of the BTech programme at ITM Skills University?

faqs.answer: A:    ITM Skills University offers BTech in full-time mode for a duration of four years. To be eligible for admission, students must have completed Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board with the relevant subjects to be eligible for admission. The selection criteria of the course require students to clear the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Challenge and the subsequent PI round. For any queries, students may connect with the admission help desk of the university.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at ITM Skills University?

faqs.answer: A:    ITM Skills University provides special fee benefits for the family members of personnel working in regional authorities. This includes departments like the Police, RTO, CIDCO, NNMC, and PMC. If your parent or spouse serves in these local government bodies, you can qualify for a scholarship while enrolled in a BA at ITM Skills University.
faqs.question: What are the fee benefits for regional authority dependents at ITM Skills University?

ITM Skills University also accepts international qualifications equivalent to Indian qualifications. These include the Cambridge High School Certificate Examination. The BA course at ITM Skills University is offered based on merit. The merit is decided by score assessment and a personal interview.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2023 and overall nice experience.

review_content.Placements: The placement department was very efficient in ensuring that all graduating students had a job offer in hand at the time of convocation. During my final year, we had all the top hospitality brands recruiting from our college, including Taj, Oberoi, ITC, JW Marriott, and even international cruise lines. In my batch, all students were placed, except for a few who opted for a master's degree. The most common role was commis for the kitchen department, and two students from my class, including me, were selected for the management trainee program. The minimum annual package was Rs. 1,80,000.

reviews_list.review_title: A deep dive into ITM Institute of Hotel Management: unveiling campus life & academic excellence.

review_content.Placements: In my batch, there are 70 students. The average package offered in this course as a commis chef is ₹1,50,000. The top recruiting companies for this course are Taj, Oberoi, JW Marriott, ITC Maratha, St. Regis, Trident, and Jio World Convention. Every student in this course gets an internship and is placed after completing the course. Initially, as a pass-out student, one is placed as a commis chef with a salary of ₹1,50,000 monthly.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are blackboards as well as smartboards in the classrooms, which are provided with a stable network. There is a single computer lab mostly used for online exams. It also includes a library with huge classrooms accommodating around 100 students. The quality of food in the college canteen is very nice, and items are bought fresh every day, from vegetables to meat.

admission_overview.title: ITM Skills University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: ITM Skills University admission 2026 is based on merit and entrance-exam depending on the course. The university offers UG and PG courses in fields, such as Management, Technology, Design & Media, and more. The application process for the university is carried out online via the official website of the university. Interested students can read the following article to learn all about the courses, eligibility, admission process, and other key admission-related information for ITM Skills University.

eligibility_selection.title: ITM Skills University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: ITM Skills University course admission is subject to the preset admission criteria of the university. For undergraduate admissions, students need to pass Clsas 12, similarly, for PG admissions, candidates need to complete graduation. The university offers courses through its various schools. Students may need to clear the PI and other selection rounds of the university as specified. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for ITM Skills University courses:

Application Process
The university accepts applications online. Students must apply on the website of the university.
Selection Process

The university selects candidates based on their merit for most of the courses. Aspirants can also get admission based on their entrance exam scores. Candidates must have CAT, XAT, NMAT, CMAT, MAT, ATMA, CUET, or State CET tests along with iSET scores for admission to MBA. Selected candidates also need to come for the personal interview round.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to payITM Skills University feesto confirm their seats at the university.

For more information, students may visit the official website of the university.

faqs.question: How many seats are available in the BTech programme of ITM Skills University?
faqs.answer: ITM Skills University follows a limited-intake model and admits around 150 students to its BTech CSE programme. There is an availability of 40 specialised seats per cohort. This smaller batch size allows faculty members to give more personal attention to each student as well as help them to guide in projects, internships along with placement preparation.

faqs.question: What are the fee benefits for regional authority dependents at ITM Skills University?
faqs.answer: ITM Skills University provides special fee benefits for the family members of personnel working in regional authorities. This includes departments like the Police, RTO, CIDCO, NNMC, and PMC. If your parent or spouse serves in these local government bodies, you can qualify for a scholarship while enrolled in a BA at ITM Skills University.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to ITM Skills University?
faqs.answer: To get admission into ITM Skills University, students need to fulfil the preset admission criteria of the desired programme. Students seeking to enrol into any of the offered courses need to fulfil the basic eligibility of the course before applying. Eligible students can follow the steps explained below to completethe ITM Skills University admission procedure:Step 1:Interested students can visit the official website of the university and apply for the course of choice.Step 2:Aside from fulfilling the basic eligibility, students must also clear the selection rounds. The selection criteria may involve entrance exam scores, Personal Interviews, and other rounds, at the discretion of the university. For detailed information, students may connect with the admission desk of the university.Step 3:Selected students need to pay ITM Skills University fees to secure their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Can I join ITM Skills University directly?
faqs.answer: No, ITM Skills University does not offer direct admissions. Students looking to join the university for any of the offered courses need to ensure that they fulfil the preset admission criteria. In addition to basic eligibility, students must also fulfil the selection criteria for the same. However, students may reach out to the admission help desk of the university to clarify any queries regardingITM Skills University admission chances.

faqs.question: Are admissions open for ITM Skills University?
faqs.answer: Yes,ITM Skills University admissionsare currently open. Students seeking to join the university need to ensure that they fulfil the admission criteira of the desired programme before applying. The university accepts applications online. Hence, prospective students need to complete the process online before the last date of the admission.
