reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 3 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Great industry exposure, strong placement, and vibrant campus life with room for academic enhancemen
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good and the facilities they provide are also great, although the college does not provide a hostel or accommodation. The campus is well connected, the library is resourceful, and regular industry visits add great practical value.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 20 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure and industry-relevant curriculum with good placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: ITM IHM offers Wi-Fi, state-of-the-art food production and F&B service labs, air-conditioned classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel and Food: Clean and secure hostels provide comfortable living, with a mess offering hygienic, balanced meals and a canteen for snacks. Medical and Sports: On-campus medical support and sports facilities for indoor and outdoor games ensure students' health and recreation.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by ITM - Institute of Hotel Management, Navi MumbaiReviewed on 13 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023 and overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is up to date with modern kitchen and classrooms with air conditioning and teaching aids. It also has a vast library and canteen. Hostel facility was available for female students. There are several kitchens for practical training, including basic and advanced stages, as well as a bakery and patisserie. Wi-Fi isn't available for all students, and the campus is located 20 minutes away from the Nerul East railway station.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 4 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A deep dive into ITM Institute of Hotel Management: unveiling campus life & academic excellence.
reviews.review_text: There are blackboards as well as smartboards in the classrooms, which are provided with a stable network. There is a single computer lab mostly used for online exams. It also includes a library with huge classrooms accommodating around 100 students. The quality of food in the college canteen is very nice, and items are bought fresh every day, from vegetables to meat.

reviews.review_heading: Really good course, good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good and there is also the facility of Wi-Fi and library. The mess food is also quite good and medical facilities are also available. There is also the facility of indoor games like table tennis and outdoor games like badminton.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by ITM - Institute of Hotel Management, Navi MumbaiReviewed on 28 Dec 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It's a good college, but due to the pandemic, we didn't get proper placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, located in a prime area, with proper Wi-Fi. There is an amazing library with a good collection of books. Classrooms are cleaned regularly. However, there are no medical facilities or areas for sports and games. There are spacious practical classrooms, but overall, everything else is okay.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 12 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided excellent facilities and infrastructure. The library was great. Kitchens were properly equipped for students to learn and practice culinary skills. Students were provided with high-quality ingredients.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 12 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM Institute of Hotel Management, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms were spacious. Kitchens and restaurants were well-equipped beyond the industry level. All kitchens had industry-standard equipment. We often got to cook exotic, rare meats too, which would be difficult to source.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 25 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for international placements.
reviews.review_text: They have six kitchens for different purposes: a front office lab, restaurants, an IT lab, and a conference room. The infrastructure is great, and all things are well-maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 25 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for hotel management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The infrastructure is good and well-maintained. Wi-Fi, canteens, stationery, and other amenities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 25 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Everything is good on our campus.
reviews.review_text: There are smart classrooms in our college. A toolkit and chef coat are also provided. Oxford books are also available. Canteen and medical facilities are good. Hostel facilities are better. There are different types of kitchens for different purposes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by ITM Institute of Hotel Management, MumbaiReviewed on 25 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Review of ITM - Institute of Hotel Management, Mumbai.
reviews.review_text: There are six kitchens and labs for the front office and housekeeping. The campus is always neat and tidy.

college_info.college_name: ITM Skills University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, ITM Skills University offers scholarships. It offers scholarships for undergraduate and postgraduate students. The university offers scholarships to economically weaker sections students. The university offers up to 50% scholarship depending on the performance in the CTO/CEO Challenge and Personal Interview with the leadership team. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to avail the scholarships.

Yes, after selection in BA programme at ITM, the student needs to pay a seat reservation fee of INR 25,000. This amount is non-refundable. The seat reservation fee payment ensures that your seat is secured. Since seats for the BA are limited and in high demand, ITM Skills University uses this process to confirm the final list of dedicated students joining the university.

The fee structure of for the BTech programme is INR 16 Lacs for four years. Students will be provided with a laptop, causal uniform, exclusive conferences and meetup passes this all included in the fee. Aspirants are required to pay for the course after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm the seat. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will be cancelled.

ITM Skills University offers scholarship via IFirst Scholarship Test. Candidates need to fill out the form for PGDM. Aspirants must appear for the test for the scholarship. The scholarship is offered to 200 meritorious students based on their performance in online scholarship test. Selected students get scholarship of 10% to 100% on first year tuition fees.

college_info.intro:
MUIT Noida offers BTech, BSc and BCA as its popular programmes. It offers BTech in specialisations such as CSE, CSE with Data Science, CSE with Animation and CSE with Cyber Security for 4 years. The School of Science and Humanities offers BSc, while the School of Science of Consciousness offers programmes such as BSc and BSc (Hons) in Maharishi Ayurveda Diet. MUIT also offers BCA, BCA (Hons) and BCA with AI/ML. Maharishi University Noida BCA fees is around INR 2.25 Lakh - 3 Lakh.
Apart from this, Maharishi University of Information Technology provides UG, PG and Doctoral programmes in various streams such as Science, Commerce, Management, Humanities, Pharmacy, Engineering, Animation, Journalism and Mass Communication, Law, and Enrichment Courses. Some of the courses include MBA, BTech, LLM, BSc, BCA, BBA LLB, BCom, MA, MCom, MCA, etc. Candidates can check out the details regarding Maharishi University of Information Technology popular programmes:

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Pharma at Maharishi University Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: The Maharishi University Noida offers BPharma through the School of Pharmaceutical Sciences which was established in 2022. The University offers BPharma for 4 years with the eligibility criteria of achieving 35%-50% after 10+2 and after the qualification of the accepted exams as per the University. The total tuition fee of this programme is around INR 4.8 Lacs for a full-time mode of study.

overview_faqs.question: Can I use any online payment application to pay fee at Maharishi University, Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: Maharishi University Noida offers online and offline mode of payment. The modes of online payment include credit/debit cards or Netbanking. Further, candidates can also scan the QR by visiting the official website of the university to pay the fee. Additionally, candidates can also pay the fee in college bank account available at official website.

overview_faqs.question: How to request a refund at Maharishi University, Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: To raised the request for refund, candidates should write a letter to the admission departments to the director admissions. Admission notifying the withdrawal with the original fee receipt. Their is no interest is paid on a refund of any fee/deposit. The Refund cheques will be issued Account Payable in the name of the concerned applicant after verification of document and receipt.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for MUIT Noida?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee is INR 200 to be paid either in cash or DD or online transaction. There is no refund for the application fee. Your application form will be considered only after payment of application fee. Candidates can get the application form on official website of MUIT Noida. For Online• Go to the university's website and click on the "Apply Now" button.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Upload the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the application form.For Offline• Either collect the application form in person or download it from the website.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Attach the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the form in person or by post.

review_summary.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: You get what you pay. College is not like "SOTY" but it's gives you a proper college experience.

content.Placements: Placement is good, but you can't completely rely on them as not all good companies come to visit. Even though the placement is high, the packages are average. If you need a good job, you need to network outside the college. In campus placement should be the backup option.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is what you pay for. All the equipment is well-maintained and meets all the proper requirements. We have a huge ground and multiple courts like badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc. Overall, it is good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a great learning experience with good placement.

content.Placements: My college offered placements for at least 60-70 percent of students. The highest package was 9-10 LPA. The lowest package was 3-4 LPA. The average package was 6-7 LPA. Some top recruiters for our course included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Capgemini, and Tech Mahindra. These companies roles in software development, testing, consulting, and IT services.
content.Infrastructure: Our department had smart classrooms, computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a library with both books and digital resources. We also had seminar halls and study areas. It supported academic and practical learning. Medical, sports, and games facilities were also included.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 80-85% of students are placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is 25 LPA - 30 LPA while the lowest package is 3 LPA to 3.5 LPA and the average package ranges from 6 LPA to 7 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and HCL.
content.Infrastructure: BCA department features smart classrooms, modern labs and extensive digital resources. Hostel offers Wi-Fi, furnished rooms and hygienic food. Medical care and sports facilities are available to enhance students' academic and overall success.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong academics at MUIT.

content.Placements: In the BCA course at Maharishi University of Information Technology, around 75–80% of students were placed through campus placement. The highest package offered was around 8–9 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average package ranged between 4.5–5 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The BCA course at MUIT is supported with modern infrastructure and facilities that enhance students' learning. The department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, a library, and seminar halls for workshops and guest lectures.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: About curriculum, placements, infrastructure, and student experience.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is 70%. The highest package is 30 LPA. Average package is 6 LPA. 75% is the placement rate for the batch 2027. The highest salary is 9 LPA. The lowest salary is 3 LPA. Top recruiters are Amazon, Meta, TCS, and HCL. Internship rate is 20-30%. Trustworthy baseline 70% placement. The average salary is 6 LPA. The highest salary is 30 LPA. These states are backed by multiple students and contributors. Edge cases have higher placement rates and packages (44 LPA to 50 LPA). 90-95% is the placement rate, likely reflecting special cases or broader university placement numbers, not unnecessarily data science alone.

admission_overview.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility, Admission Process and Scholarships

admission_process.title: Maharishi University of Information Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maharishi University of Information Technology, Noida has been recognised by the UGC and AICTE. The university offers various UG and PG programmes in various streams such as Data Science, Animation, Law, Consciousness and Journalism and mass Communication. The duration of all these programmes is between one and five years. The application form for MUIT can be submitted either at the Admission cell, Noida campus or through the website. Direct admission will be offered based on your JEE score/ CUET score/ CLAT score or if you score 90% in class 12 from a recognized board.

Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida campus offers UG, PG and doctorate-level programmes under the School of Law, Animation, Data Science and Journalism & Mass Communication. The duration of all these programmes is between one and five years. Find below the MUIT Noida courses, along with eligibility and selection:
JEE, CUET, MUIT Entrance exam

The university offers admission both based on entrance and merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates have to get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling, an entrance exam followed by counselling, merit list release and final admission. Find below the steps for more understanding:

Application Process:The application form for admission is available at www.muitnoida.edu.in. You need to fill in all the required details in the application form to complete the process of your application.

Application Fees:The application fee for admission is INR 200. You can make the payment online or by cash at MUIT Noida Accounts office or MUIT Noida Admission Cell. You can also pay by Cheque/DD in favour of 'Maharishi University of Information Technology'. Your application form will be considered only after successful payment of the application fee.

Selection Process - JEE Score | CUET Score | CLAT Score | MUIT Entrance Exam:If you meet the eligibility criteria, you will be contacted by the MUIT counsellor for the entrance exam. You will need to appear for the exam as per the schedule provided by the University. After the exam, applicants who clear the exam will receive an email from the MUIT counsellor. Direct admission will be offered based on your JEE score/ CUET score/ CLAT score or if you score 90% in class 12 from a recognized board.

Admission Confirmation:Your admission will be confirmed only on the availability of the seat and deposition of 50% of the semester fee. Once your admission is confirmed, you will receive the Admission letter from MUIT.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for various courses at Maharishi University Noida?
faqs.answer: For the Maharishi University Noida popular programmes, candidates might spend around INR 5-6 Lacs for the total tuition fees of 4 years. Apart from this, for a course such as BSc, candidates might have to spend a total tuition fee of INR 1.8 – 6 Lakh. In total, a candidate might have to spend a minimum of INR 40,000 to a maximum of INR 6 Lacs on the total tuition fees. Besides this, there are one-time fee cycles and recurring expenses that a candidate might need to take care of.

reviews.review_heading: You get what you pay. College is not like "SOTY" but it's gives you a proper college experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is what you pay for. All the equipment is well-maintained and meets all the proper requirements. We have a huge ground and multiple courts like badminton court, basketball court, volleyball court, table tennis, carrom, chess, etc. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great learning experience with good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our department had smart classrooms, computer labs, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a library with both books and digital resources. We also had seminar halls and study areas. It supported academic and practical learning. Medical, sports, and games facilities were also included.

reviews.review_heading: A decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: BCA department features smart classrooms, modern labs and extensive digital resources. Hostel offers Wi-Fi, furnished rooms and hygienic food. Medical care and sports facilities are available to enhance students' academic and overall success.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics at MUIT.
reviews.review_text: The BCA course at MUIT is supported with modern infrastructure and facilities that enhance students' learning. The department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled smart classrooms, a library, and seminar halls for workshops and guest lectures.

reviews.review_heading: About curriculum, placements, infrastructure, and student experience.
reviews.review_text: MUIT Noida campus is spread across approximately 350 acres, featuring a botanical garden, lush lawns, and well-planned internal roads within a serene, pollution-free environment. We have smart classrooms. It has spacious, air-conditioned rooms equipped with projectors, microphones, digital boards, and Wi-Fi connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: MUIT Noida offers solid academics and infrastructure for BCA students.
reviews.review_text: MUIT Noida delivered a comprehensive infrastructure framework covering academic, recreational, residential, and wellness needs. The campus boasts modern classrooms, robust lab setup, mindfulness space, and strong support facilities like hostels, food services, gym, and healthcare. While most students appreciate the quality and functionality of these facilities, especially for academics. Some believe there was room for enhancement in campus life and sporting infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, vibrant campus life, but placements and industry exposure need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent with clear rooms and basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water coolers, and common study areas. Mess food is best like hotel food, sometimes repetitive but hygienic. Canteen offers better taste and variety. Medical facilities are very best.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great place for great education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is too good, best, and no word to express. Also sports complex is next level. Every type of thing is present. Hostel is too good, clean, and ragging-free. Mess food is too tasty and hygienic. Staff is too good. Everything is best all over.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, vibrant campus life, but placements and industry exposure need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and basic amenities like Wi-Fi, water coolers, and common study areas. Mess food is the best, like hotel food, sometimes repetitive but hygienic. Canteen offers better taste and variety. Medical facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Best place and best college ever.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is next level, premium, or port class and advanced class. Also, the hostel is good, clean, and ragging-free because the college security and management are good. Mess is clean and food is too tasty and hygienic. Also, the staff is too good. Park and sports complex are very well.

reviews.review_heading: College is bad in terms of placement, infrastructure is good and huge but teaching style is bad.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good in comparison to other colleges, AC in every class and labs, computers are working, and even hostel is clean with good food. They have a cricket ground, a football ground, and a basketball court too. Apart from this, there is a small field for volleyball and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maharishi University of Information Technology - Noida Campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is excellent and very nice. Hostels are also very clean and very peaceful. Mess is also very clean and hygienic. Libraries are offered with air-conditioned rooms and also provide many books. Each type of book is present in the library. Free Wi-Fi connection, fast internet connection, etc., make the college infrastructure five-star.

reviews.review_heading: Please check out our college. Best college to visit is our college. Thank you.
reviews.review_text: Our college facilities are good. Big playing grounds like cricket ground, football ground, a big canteen, a big library, clean washrooms, and a good environment are available. Hostel has good facilities. Our hostel does not allow non-veg. Overall, good college facilities are provided by our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi -Fi is available in the whole college for students as well as for teachers. There are air conditioned libraries, classrooms, and laptops are also provided by the college in libraries for doing coding. Hostel is very clean, and the mess is also very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are very good. The environment is also very good. Libraries are air-conditioned and have all available facilities. College has cleanliness. Mess is very much hygienic. Hostels are also well managed, and the staff is also very good.

college_info.college_name: Maharishi University of Information Technology Noida Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The application fee is INR 200 to be paid either in cash or DD or online transaction. There is no refund for the application fee. Your application form will be considered only after payment of application fee. Candidates can get the application form on official website of MUIT Noida.

For Online• Go to the university's website and click on the "Apply Now" button.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Upload the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the application form.

For Offline• Either collect the application form in person or download it from the website.• Complete the application form with the correct information.• Attach the required documents and pay the application fee.• Submit the form in person or by post.

MUIT Noida provides relaxation through scholarships to meritorious students and students who actively participate in extracurricular activities. It also takes sports, performing arts and literary skills into consideration as the eligibility criteria for scholarship. The University also offers merit-cum-means based scholarships for students from other categories. The Scholarships are also awarded based on the rank or score of entrance exams or aptitude tests.

The Maharishi University Noida offers BPharma through the School of Pharmaceutical Sciences which was established in 2022. The University offers BPharma for 4 years with the eligibility criteria of achieving 35%-50% after 10+2 and after the qualification of the accepted exams as per the University. The total tuition fee of this programme is around INR 4.8 Lacs for a full-time mode of study.

Maharishi University Noida fee structure varies with the difference in the duration of the course and the level of the program. Offering courses in UG, PG and Diploma levels with a minimum span of 1 year and a maximum of 5 years, the University offers a decent fee structure of a minimum INR 40,000 as a total tuition fee. The highest total tuition fee is around INR 6 Lacs which is of BTech. Apart from the tuition fees, the fee structure includes various other recurring expenses and one-time fees that a candidate must take into consideration.
